100%小狼人::2020.tmdb_overview: 福來弟原以為自己可以變身成為高大威猛的狼人，結果卻意外變成了一隻超萌貴賓狗，還被惡搞染上粉紅色的髮色！為了證明自己擁有和狼人一樣的超強能力，小小貴賓狗展開了一場超乎想像的城市冒險。
100%小狼人::2020.tmdb_overview_en: Freddy Lupin, heir to a proud family line of werewolves, is in for a shock when on his 14th birthday his first 'warfing' goes awry, turning him into a ferocious poodle.  The pack elders give Freddy until the next moonrise to prove he has the heart of a wolf, or risk being cast out forever.  With the help of an unlikely ally in a streetwise stray named Batty, Freddy must prove he's 100% Wolf.

100％wolf::2020.tmdb_overview: 福來弟原以為自己可以變身成為高大威猛的狼人，結果卻意外變成了一隻超萌貴賓狗，還被惡搞染上粉紅色的髮色！為了證明自己擁有和狼人一樣的超強能力，小小貴賓狗展開了一場超乎想像的城市冒險。
100％wolf::2020.tmdb_overview_en: Freddy Lupin, heir to a proud family line of werewolves, is in for a shock when on his 14th birthday his first 'warfing' goes awry, turning him into a ferocious poodle.  The pack elders give Freddy until the next moonrise to prove he has the heart of a wolf, or risk being cast out forever.  With the help of an unlikely ally in a streetwise stray named Batty, Freddy must prove he's 100% Wolf.

2001 a space odyssey::.tmdb_overview: 電影大師史丹利庫伯力克執導的科幻鉅作，以近二小時半的篇幅，描繪了人類的過去與未來，廣集特殊攝影技巧與精準畫面感拍攝而成，可謂是空前絕後。  為了解開神秘的石柱突然屹立於地面並攻擊人的秘密，原子動力太空般帝斯卡巴里號出發飛往距離八億公里遠的木星。此太空船的成員包括波曼船長、布魯飛行員及三個在圓筒內冬眠的隊員等五人。  途中電腦HAL發生錯亂，破壞了冬眠裝置，布魯被誘出船外，於黑暗的太空中被殺，波曼船長則被困在母船中，與之展開生死格鬥，結果人類終於獲勝。不久太空船在進入木星的軌道後，因船長發現某地有與月球上的石柱一模一樣的東西，就駛向它，卻發生意外。  當他醒來時，看見自已正和太空船在路易十六的臥室中。超越時間與空間，所有的一切東西都消失於白光之中後，飄浮在太空上的綠色地球，由一胎兒看守著，此胎兒正是波曼轉世而成的，正等待著自己出生的日子。  這部內容以不遠的未來為背景，在廣闊的宇宙空間中，人類將面對不可思議之事，廣集特殊攝影技巧與精準畫面感拍攝而成，可謂是空前絕後。
2001 a space odyssey::.tmdb_overview_en: Humanity finds a mysterious object buried beneath the lunar surface and sets off to find its origins with the help of HAL 9000, the world's most advanced super computer.

3670::.tmdb_overview: 孤立於首爾「大都市的愛情法」邊緣，哲俊的生活屬於脫北者間的小圈圈，更因隱藏的性向而總感到格格不入。在鼓起勇氣參加了一場聯誼後，他意外踏入另一個屬於同志的社群，更認識了另一名少年永准，開啟了未曾有過的新生活。然而，無論是北緯38度線上的思鄉遠眺，或在鐘路三街裡的情愫暗湧，人人都得面對自己反覆繞著轉的圈圈，困於跳脫或停留的取捨抉擇中……
3670::.tmdb_overview_en: Despite the close bonds among fellow defectors, Cheol-jun—a young North Korean defector—felt isolated while hiding his gay identity. Finally, he takes his first step into South Korea's vibrant gay community and forms close ties after meeting Yeong-jun at a casual gathering. Yet, a trivial misunderstanding shatters these fragile bonds.

404，初雪的約定::.tmdb_overview: 千禧年剛過，靦腆高中生敬煥轉學到學風保守的大邱。他愛看日本動漫、聽J-POP音樂，更自架音源網站，在日韓關係緊繃的時局下，像個不被人理解的怪胎，唯有那溫潤笑容的同桌男孩在民，某天闖進了他的世界。他們坐同一班公車、分同一對耳機，雖然音樂品味迥異，但總是形影不離。難掩暗戀思緒，當敬煥終於鼓起勇氣坦露心跡時，卻發現在民壓抑著更多他所不知道的事，他能否如願聽見那初雪的約定呢？
404，初雪的約定::.tmdb_overview_en: In 2001, Lee Gyeong-hwan and his mother move from rural Yeongcheon to the city of Daegu to leave behind a broken marriage and hurtful rumours. Reticent and shy, he struggles to acclimatise but his seatmate happens to be Jae-min, the cool class president who takes Gyeong-hwan under his wing. While they quickly bond over a shared love of Japanese culture, particularly the music of Globe, Jae-min's affectionate and open attitude allows Gyeong-hwan to relax and reveal his feelings in a world where he must hide them.

a big bold beautiful journey::2025.tmdb_overview: 莎拉和大衛是兩位素未謀面的單身男女，在一次共同朋友的婚禮上相遇，因為各種出人意料的命運轉折，他們踏上一段大膽、奇幻又美麗的旅程。這是一場充滿趣味與奇想的冒險，他們得以重返各自過去的重要時刻，重新理解自己如何走到今天的現在，甚至有機會改寫自己的未來。
a big bold beautiful journey::2025.tmdb_overview_en: Sarah and David are single strangers who meet at a mutual friend’s wedding and soon, through a surprising twist of fate, find themselves on a funny, fantastical, sweeping adventure together where they get to re-live important moments from their respective pasts, illuminating how they got to where they are in the present... and possibly getting a chance to alter their futures.

about time::.tmdb_overview: 提姆有家族遺傳的特殊能力，可以穿越時空，而他也運用這種能力追到了他喜愛的女孩。但是，提姆越來越頻繁地使用這種能力，卻不清楚其中隱藏的危險……
about time::.tmdb_overview_en: The night after another unsatisfactory New Year's party, Tim's father tells his son that the men in his family have always had the ability to travel through time. They can't change history, but they can change what happens and has happened in their own lives. Thus begins the start of a lesson in learning to appreciate life itself as it is, as it comes, and most importantly, the people living alongside us.

amelie::.tmdb_overview: Rotem is a teenage boy who lives in the kibbutz and feels like he doesn’t belong there. The main reason is that Rotem is also a Drag Queen known as Amelie. Rotem goes through a process with himself and his family – he has a unique story.
amelie::.tmdb_overview_en: Rotem is a teenage boy who lives in the kibbutz and feels like he doesn’t belong there. The main reason is that Rotem is also a Drag Queen known as Amelie. Rotem goes through a process with himself and his family – he has a unique story.

among us::2021.tmdb_overview: A group of Middle School friends try to solve the mystery of their murdered friend.
among us::2021.tmdb_overview_en: A group of Middle School friends try to solve the mystery of their murdered friend.

barbie as rapunzel::2002.tmdb_overview: Barbie stars as Rapunzel, a young girl who is entrapped by a magical barrier by the wicked, Gothel. Rapunzel finds an escape where she finds a Prince and a feud between two kingdoms which goes back to the day she was kidnapped as a child.
barbie as rapunzel::2002.tmdb_overview_en: Barbie stars as Rapunzel, a young girl who is entrapped by a magical barrier by the wicked, Gothel. Rapunzel finds an escape where she finds a Prince and a feud between two kingdoms which goes back to the day she was kidnapped as a child.

barbie in the nutcracker::2001.tmdb_overview: The Mouse King casts an evil spell over Clara that causes her to shrink. Clara and the Nutcracker set out on an adventurous journey to find Sugarplum Princess, who has the power to undo the spell.
barbie in the nutcracker::2001.tmdb_overview_en: The Mouse King casts an evil spell over Clara that causes her to shrink. Clara and the Nutcracker set out on an adventurous journey to find Sugarplum Princess, who has the power to undo the spell.
barbie in the nutcracker::2001.tmdb_title_local: 芭比 - 胡桃夾子的夢幻之旅

before sunset::.tmdb_overview: 九年前，傑西（伊森霍克）與席琳（茱莉蝶兒）在火車上相遇，在維也納共度一晚，在日出前定下半年之約後各自離去，但是卻從此失去與對方的聯繫。九年後，傑西帶著以這段邂逅寫成的書來到巴黎，就在他開新書記者會的同時，席琳出現了。日落之後就要撘趕著搭飛機的傑西，利用留在巴黎最後的幾個小時，拉著席琳在咖啡館中、巴黎街頭與塞納河上，彷彿停不下來似的說著話，想用最短的時間知道對方這九年來的境遇。  兩人這時好比站在凌虛御空的鋼索上，似乎必須趁這個機會作出某種重大的人生決定，卻又好像只是兩個再次相逢彼此投緣的心靈舊識，永遠有聊不完的話題。日落時分即將來臨，離傑西飛機起飛的時間越來越接近了…，兩人是否會做出改變彼此今生的決定？！
before sunset::.tmdb_overview_en: Nine years later, Jesse travels across Europe giving readings from a book he wrote about the night he spent in Vienna with Celine. After his reading in Paris, Celine finds him, and they spend part of the day together before Jesse has to again leave for a flight. They are both in relationships now, and Jesse has a son, but as their strong feelings for each other start to return, both confess a longing for more.

block 5::2024.tmdb_overview: Gain an eye-opening perspective on the US prison system by joining inmate Jose Flores on a journey from sunrise to sunset. 5 BLOCK provides an authentic look into the life of a prisoner, exposing the daily routines, aspirations, and resilience of an individual often overlooked by society. Through Jose’s personal story, audiences are invited to reflect on their own attitudes toward incarceration and the power of redemption.
block 5::2024.tmdb_overview_en: Gain an eye-opening perspective on the US prison system by joining inmate Jose Flores on a journey from sunrise to sunset. 5 BLOCK provides an authentic look into the life of a prisoner, exposing the daily routines, aspirations, and resilience of an individual often overlooked by society. Through Jose’s personal story, audiences are invited to reflect on their own attitudes toward incarceration and the power of redemption.

butterflies::2024.tmdb_overview: Costin, a teenage boy, likes his neighbour, Mimi, so he tries to impress her.
butterflies::2024.tmdb_overview_en: Costin, a teenage boy, likes his neighbour, Mimi, so he tries to impress her.

carpinchos::2024.tmdb_overview: 狩獵季節就要開始了，水豚一家為了躲避獵人的襲擊，偷偷摸摸地來到了雞舍。但母雞們對這群不速之客一點兒也不信任，三番兩次想趕走牠們，唯獨小雞對小水豚釋出了友誼。這份單純而信任的友誼，也意外改寫了兩個家族的命運⋯⋯。
carpinchos::2024.tmdb_overview_en: A female capybara and her cubs are fleeing from a hunter who has settled in the lagoon where they live. Their search for shelter takes them to a nearby chicken coop, but the chickens, seeing their routine threatened, reject the capybaras and react by setting boundaries to keep them at a distance. The curiosity of the youngest, a puppy and a chick, will make them transgress the boundaries and take some risks in order to get to know each other. The situation will lead to an unexpected end that will change the lives of both species and, perhaps, that of some other animals.

dolphin::2024.tmdb_overview: While wallowing at the beach, DB finds a girl washed up on the shore.
dolphin::2024.tmdb_overview_en: While wallowing at the beach, DB finds a girl washed up on the shore.

dos pajaritos::2022.tmdb_overview: A little red bird perches on the treetop and begins to sing sweetly. The two little birds hear it and begin a courtship competition where each tries to get attention.
dos pajaritos::2022.tmdb_overview_en: A little red bird perches on the treetop and begins to sing sweetly. The two little birds hear it and begin a courtship competition where each tries to get attention.

e t the extra terrestrial::1982.tmdb_overview: 艾略特是一個孤單的小男孩，他生長在加州的一個單親家庭，有一天他碰到一個來自外太空的外星人，他發現這個長相滑稽古怪的外星人不但心地善良，而且聰明睿智，於是他便決定幫助他稱為“ＥＴ”的外星人，和他的星球聯絡，並且協助他逃過科學家和政府單位的追捕，安全地把它送回家。他們就此展開一場連他們都想像不到的冒險之旅。
e t the extra terrestrial::1982.tmdb_overview_en: An alien is left behind on Earth and saved by the 10-year-old Elliott who decides to keep him hidden in his home. While a task force hunts for the extra-terrestrial, Elliott, his brother, and his little sister Gertie form an emotional bond with their new friend, and try to help him find his way home.

e t 外星人::1982.tmdb_overview: 艾略特是一個孤單的小男孩，他生長在加州的一個單親家庭，有一天他碰到一個來自外太空的外星人，他發現這個長相滑稽古怪的外星人不但心地善良，而且聰明睿智，於是他便決定幫助他稱為“ＥＴ”的外星人，和他的星球聯絡，並且協助他逃過科學家和政府單位的追捕，安全地把它送回家。他們就此展開一場連他們都想像不到的冒險之旅。

While a task force hunts for the extra-terrestrial, Elliott, his brother, and his little sister Gertie form an emotional bond with their new friend, and try to help him find his way home.

felix and the treasure of morgaa::2021.tmdb_original_title: Félix et le trésor de Morgäa
felix and the treasure of morgaa::2021.tmdb_overview: 12歲的菲利斯相信兩年前在海上失蹤的父親仍然活著，於是他決定出發尋找父親的下落。陪他一起出海的夥伴有退休的漁夫老湯姆、愛偷東西的獨腳鸚鵡阿嘎，以及生性像狗的貓咪來福。他們一路漂流到永夜島，那裡有一座地下城，住著一個秘密社群，由狂妄自大的莫嘉所統治，那裏擁有令人難以置信的寶藏。
felix and the treasure of morgaa::2021.tmdb_overview_en: Taking advantage of his mother's absence as she departs on a cruise ship for some rest and relaxation, 12-year-old Félix sets out to find his father, a fisherman who disappeared at sea two years earlier.
felix and the treasure of morgaa::2021.tmdb_title: Felix and the Treasure of Morgäa
felix and the treasure of morgaa::2021.tmdb_title_en: Felix and the Treasure of Morgäa
felix and the treasure of morgaa::2021.tmdb_title_local: 菲利斯之永夜島歷險記

france::2021.tmdb_overview: 法蘭西是位明星主播，在電視台、遠方戰地和家庭生活中忙得不可開交。她瘋狂又高調的生活因為一場肇事車禍而完全顛覆，這也使得她對人生充滿疑惑。當法蘭西試圖隱姓埋名，回歸簡單的生活時，她過往的名氣卻不斷追趕著她，直到遇見一場意外的戀情，觸動她的內心…。
france::2021.tmdb_overview_en: A celebrity journalist, juggling her busy career and personal life, has her life over-turned by a freak car accident.

girlfriends::.tmdb_overview: A photographer and her best friend are roommates. She is stuck with small-change shooting jobs and dreams of success. When her roommate decides to get married and leave, she feels hurt and has to learn how to deal with living alone.
girlfriends::.tmdb_overview_en: A photographer and her best friend are roommates. She is stuck with small-change shooting jobs and dreams of success. When her roommate decides to get married and leave, she feels hurt and has to learn how to deal with living alone.

go away alfred::2023.tmdb_overview: Alfred had to flee his country because of the war. Without housing, he wanders, from rejection to rejection. One day he meets Sonia, who offers him a coffee…
go away alfred::2023.tmdb_overview_en: Alfred had to flee his country because of the war. Without housing, he wanders, from rejection to rejection. One day he meets Sonia, who offers him a coffee…

hamnet::.tmdb_overview: 1580年，英國。貧困的拉丁語家教威廉莎士比亞遇見自由奔放的艾格妮絲，兩人深受對方吸引，展開一段熾熱戀情，並迅速步入婚姻，與三個孩子過著幸福的生活。但當遠在倫敦的威廉戲劇事業迅速發展之際，艾格妮絲卻必須獨自撐起他們的家庭。突如其來的悲劇，讓這對夫妻曾經堅不可摧的羈絆就此受到嚴峻考驗，而這段經歷，也造就了莎士比亞的不朽傑作────〈哈姆雷特〉。
hamnet::.tmdb_overview_en: The powerful story of love and loss that inspired the creation of Shakespeare's timeless masterpiece, Hamlet.

happy graduation::2026.tmdb_overview: A young woman is literally haunted by her future at her university graduation party.
happy graduation::2026.tmdb_overview_en: A young woman is literally haunted by her future at her university graduation party.

home alone 2 lost in new york::1992.tmdb_original_title: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York
home alone 2 lost in new york::1992.tmdb_overview: 第一部的主要演員原班人馬演出，包括麥考利·克金和兩個演反派的笨賊。故事處景在紐約大都會，講述那位超乎常人的小孩，在聖誕前夕在機場與家人失散，小孩獨自上錯飛機去了紐約。在一幢吉屋用不同的家居陷阱，招待逃獄出來的兩個笨賊。
home alone 2 lost in new york::1992.tmdb_overview_en: Instead of flying to Florida with his folks, Kevin ends up alone in New York, where he gets a hotel room with his dad's credit card—despite problems from a clerk and meddling bellboy. But when Kevin runs into his old nemeses, the Wet Bandits, he's determined to foil their plans to rob a toy store on Christmas Eve.
home alone 2 lost in new york::1992.tmdb_title: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York
home alone 2 lost in new york::1992.tmdb_title_en: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York

home alone::1990.tmdb_overview: 一年一度的聖誕節又到了。全家忙著外出歡度聖誕假期，不料忙中出錯，將家裡最小的成員——8歲的凱文（Macaulay Culkin 飾）留在了家裡。爸爸媽媽急壞了，可此時他們已經身在外地，一時亦無可奈何。倒是凱文樂壞了，難得一個人在家，凱文將家里布置成了“遊樂場”。  兩個剛出獄的竊賊將目光瞄向了凱文家。當他們鬼鬼祟祟的踏入凱文家時，凱文憑藉自己的醒目和家裡的“遊樂場機關”，和兩個笨賊玩起了“遊戲”，笑料百出。凱文最後能否這場“遊戲”的勝利？
home alone::1990.tmdb_overview_en: Eight-year-old Kevin McCallister makes the most of the situation after his family unwittingly leaves him behind when they go on Christmas vacation. When thieves try to break into his home, he puts up a fight like no other.

house arrest::2021.tmdb_overview: A few kidnappers are taken hostage by a bunch of kids. Is rat kidnapping a cat possible?
house arrest::2021.tmdb_overview_en: A few kidnappers are taken hostage by a bunch of kids. Is rat kidnapping a cat possible?

inception::2010.tmdb_overview: 偷技高超的神偷唐姆柯比，對客戶委託的偷竊行動無往不利，目標是趁對象進入深沉的睡眠、心智遂呈現最脆弱狀態時，入侵其潛意識，將最不可告人的機密手到擒來。天賦異稟加上高科技儀器，使柯比周旋於企業間的爾虞我詐，成為不二人想的商業間諜，相對也付出極大代價，他不但淪為國際逃犯，也失去所愛的家人。因緣際會，柯比遇到一個平反的契機，能重新找回到失去的人生。這次，除了以往的潛意識搶案，還須帶領一群專家團隊走險扭轉目標人物的思維。不是偷取構想，而是植入思想。出乎意料的是，敵方竟早已設下層層防火牆，推算出其一舉一動，柯比團隊深深陷入只許成功不許失敗的夢境攻防戰…。
inception::2010.tmdb_overview_en: Cobb, a skilled thief who commits corporate espionage by infiltrating the subconscious of his targets is offered a chance to regain his old life as payment for a task considered to be impossible: "inception", the implantation of another person's idea into a target's subconscious.

kabul between prayers::.tmdb_overview: 祈禱聲間，步槍上肩，信仰與武裝構成日常。虔誠的阿富汗兄弟身在其間：哥哥巡邏站崗，視殉道為夢想，亦為俗務心煩；弟弟尚未成年，放牧遊玩、背誦經文，以兄長為榜樣，天真全寫在臉上。鏡頭用開放取代評斷，微觀塔利班神權統治下的男性成長。外人眼中的洗腦灌輸，在他們心中是充實救贖，使觀眾擺盪於同感與震撼之間。
kabul between prayers::.tmdb_overview_en: A devoted soldier of the Taliban's ideology that has shaped his destiny since birth, Samim (23) struggles between the alluring promises of martyrdom and the mundanity of his daily existence as a husband and farmer. Samim's younger brother, Rafi (14), idolizes his big brother as he navigates the confusion of adolescence, leaving behind playfulness to enter a world shaped by decades of military intervention and resulting radicalization.

looking up::2019.tmdb_overview: While chasing a serial killer inspired by the god of sleep, a cop's life is overturned by the death of her lover. Looming monsters and the need for revenge cloud the border between her nightmares and reality. A cosmic horror, weird tale.
looking up::2019.tmdb_overview_en: While chasing a serial killer inspired by the god of sleep, a cop's life is overturned by the death of her lover. Looming monsters and the need for revenge cloud the border between her nightmares and reality. A cosmic horror, weird tale.

mirrors no 3::.tmdb_overview: 鋼琴系學生蘿拉（寶拉貝爾 飾）在一次週末出遊途中，她意外捲入車禍，雖然毫髮無傷但男友卻重傷過世，內心則被巨大的驚嚇與空虛籠罩。在德國鄉間遇見一名目睹事故的婦人，對方因蘿拉神似早逝的女兒，而溫柔地收留她進入宛如世外桃源的家庭。這個看似溫暖的避風港，實則充滿難以言明的替代與投射，婦人試圖將失去女兒的空缺，填補在蘿拉身上，而蘿拉也在被關懷與被期待之間，逐漸感到窒息。
mirrors no 3::.tmdb_overview_en: On a weekend trip to the countryside, Laura miraculously survives a car crash. Physically unhurt but deeply shaken, she is taken in by a local woman who witnessed the accident and now cares for Laura with motherly devotion. When her husband and adult son also give up their initial resistance to Laura's presence, the four of them slowly build up some family-like routine. But soon they can no longer ignore their past...

my brother chases dinosaurs::2019.tmdb_overview: 傑克的弟弟傑歐患有唐氏症。小時候的傑克相信父母對他說的謊，覺得傑歐是個擁有超能力的孩子，就像漫畫裡一樣。然而，現在的傑克就要上高中了，他已經不再相信他的弟弟是超人，事實上，他覺得他很丟臉，尤其是在他遇到艾蓮娜之後。傑克絕不允許自己在心儀的女孩面前出糗，於是照顧弟弟這件事很快就成了他的負擔。傑克甚至假裝自己沒有弟弟，並向新同學，尤其是艾蓮娜，隱藏了這件事。但如果你無法愛一個人的全部，包含他的缺點，別人也不會愛你的全部。傑歐將用他直接的方式、獨特的觀點、簡單卻有智慧的話語，來教會哥哥傑克這個人生道理。
my brother chases dinosaurs::2019.tmdb_overview_en: As a child, Jack believed the tender lie his parents told him, that Gio was a special being with superpowers, as in a comic book. Now that he is about to go to high school, however, Jack no longer believes that his brother is a superhero, in fact, he is almost ashamed of him, especially since he met Arianna, the first love of his life.

oasis::.tmdb_overview: Two female agents from a rival gang are sent to disrupt the operations of a gold-smuggler's caravan in Africa.
oasis::.tmdb_overview_en: Two female agents from a rival gang are sent to disrupt the operations of a gold-smuggler's caravan in Africa.

paprika::.tmdb_overview: 這是一部描繪歡場女子回憶錄的情色電影。電影改編自原著小說1748年發行的 經典情色小說 Fanny Hill，作者是 John Cleland。義大利情色電影大師 Tinto Brass 這部情色作品《紅辣椒》，只鬆散地參考 Fanny Hill 的故事，劇情和人物大異其趣。義大利女星 Deborah Caprioglio 飾演女主角 Paprika，一位為了未婚夫而進入歡場賺錢的年輕辣妹，擁有天使臉孔和魔鬼身材。《紅辣椒》和《新蕩女花妮》同樣改編自同一原著小說，不過在義大利情色電影大師 Tinto Brass 的巧妙改編詮釋之下，《紅辣椒》還蠻好看，香艷刺激，又有點輕鬆詼諧的調性 ....
paprika::.tmdb_overview_en: In 1957 Trieste, a few months before the general ban on brothels, inexperienced country girl Mimma becomes Paprika to finance her useless boyfriend as a prostitute. Amid the hustle and bustle of Rome, Paprika drifts from one brothel to another as she learns the ropes and works her way up one client at a time. However, as Paprika embarks on a stormy journey of self-discovery and sexual liberation, the sense that something is missing haunts her. Is Paprika meant to experience a passionate romance and solve the great mystery of true love?

pitch perfect::.tmdb_overview: 巴頓大學新鮮人貝卡是一個寧可聽耳機音樂、也不願意聽別人講話的少女，郤意外加入學校的阿卡貝拉女子美聲合唱團，該社團集結了又乖又壞又怪的各樣女性成員，唯一共通點就是能清唱出猶如天籟的美聲。與校園格格不入的貝卡，如何以她驚人的才華改變阿卡貝拉的傳統表演方式？又如何率領這群女生與競爭激烈的全國美聲團體一較高下？共譜青春生命的繽紛音符！
pitch perfect::.tmdb_overview_en: College student Beca knows she does not want to be part of a clique, but that's exactly where she finds herself after arriving at her new school. Thrust in among mean gals, nice gals and just plain weird gals, Beca finds that the only thing they have in common is how well they sing together. She takes the women of the group out of their comfort zone of traditional arrangements and into a world of amazing harmonic combinations in a fight to the top of college music competitions.

poetry::.tmdb_overview: Cate is a smart, working class girl under the thumb of her best friend Maddie, but Cate is having trouble conforming to what Maddie and high school society demand of her. Both girls are preoccupied with the same boy, but only one of them is being sent poetry.
poetry::.tmdb_overview_en: Cate is a smart, working class girl under the thumb of her best friend Maddie, but Cate is having trouble conforming to what Maddie and high school society demand of her. Both girls are preoccupied with the same boy, but only one of them is being sent poetry.

ran::1985.tmdb_overview: Appunni, a Kathakali artist is the cousin of Chandramathi, a classical dancer, and is in love with her. Madhavan son of Karunakarapanickker who is the owner of Sadanam the Kathakali Kalari, returns from Russia and falls for Chandramathi and eventually they get married. Then enters Mahalakshmi- she is an artist who wants to learn Kathakali and is also the daughter of a rich business-man.
ran::1985.tmdb_overview_en: Appunni, a Kathakali artist is the cousin of Chandramathi, a classical dancer, and is in love with her. Madhavan son of Karunakarapanickker who is the owner of Sadanam the Kathakali Kalari, returns from Russia and falls for Chandramathi and eventually they get married. Then enters Mahalakshmi- she is an artist who wants to learn Kathakali and is also the daughter of a rich business-man.

rebecca::.tmdb_overview: 年輕女子（Joan Fontaine 飾）初遇曼德利主人德文特（Laurence Olivier 飾）是在海邊的懸崖邊上。她以為德文特要跳海自盡，大叫一聲，讓德文特生氣不已。然而，接下來的二人相識繼而相知的經歷讓他們墮入愛河，結為伉儷，女子成為了曼德利莊園的女主人。幸福的生活眼看就要鋪開，這個新婚妻子卻遭遇到了陰森的「寒流」。她發現這個莊園到處可見德文特前妻麗貝卡的影子，她的名字，在傢俱留下痕跡，更令新婚妻子不安的是，管家丹佛斯太太，更是念念不忘麗貝卡，對這個新來的主人充滿仇恨。就連丈夫德文特，也不願意解釋這一切，彷彿他的內心還有舊情。麗貝卡猶如夢魘般瀰漫在曼德利莊園，事情開始變得越來越複雜。
rebecca::.tmdb_overview_en: Story of a young woman who marries a fascinating widower only to find out that she must live in the shadow of his former wife, Rebecca, who died mysteriously several years earlier. The young wife must come to grips with the terrible secret of her handsome, cold husband, Max De Winter. She must also deal with the jealous, obsessed Mrs. Danvers, the housekeeper, who will not accept her as the mistress of the house.

scarygirl::2023.tmdb_overview: 在與世隔絕的半島上，小女孩阿奇擁有發明天賦，由父親布利斯特撫養長大，布利斯特是一隻稀有的巨型章魚，擁有再生的奇特能力，一場意外讓外界發現了他們，阿奇遇見了賞金獵人兔大師與蛋蛋，接著布利斯特遭人綁架，為了拯救父親，他們踏上前往光之城的旅程，展開一場關於勇氣、自我與成長的動人冒險。
scarygirl::2023.tmdb_overview_en: As her world is shrouded in darkness, a young girl must overcome her fears and travel to a mysterious city of light, save her father from a dangerous scientist and prevent the destruction of her planet.

sentimental value::.tmdb_overview: A group of coworkers buy a piano at a yard sale for a friend in need.
sentimental value::.tmdb_overview_en: A group of coworkers buy a piano at a yard sale for a friend in need.

singin’ in the rain::.tmdb_overview: 在無聲電影時代，演員表演的身體動作遠比聲音重要，麗娜和唐正是憑著姣好外型而大受歡迎的明星搭檔。然而，有聲電影的出現，讓聲音難聽的麗娜受到極大的考驗。唐請來聲音甜美的凱西為麗娜配音，這樣的合作讓麗娜聲名大噪，但走紅的麗娜卻越來越高傲。另一方面，愛上凱西的唐正思考著，要如何讓才藝俱佳的凱西獲得該有的名譽……
singin’ in the rain::.tmdb_overview_en: In 1927 Hollywood, a silent film star falls for a chorus girl just as he and his paranoid screen partner struggle to make the difficult transition to talking pictures.

sirat::.tmdb_overview: Destruction and tyranny dominate a world in perdition. To escape, a man turns into an eagle.
sirat::.tmdb_overview_en: Destruction and tyranny dominate a world in perdition. To escape, a man turns into an eagle.

sirāt::2026.tmdb_overview: 一對父子來到摩洛哥的沙漠邊緣，尋找失蹤已久的親人。他們先在一場午夜銳舞派對中發送協尋傳單，接著經由一群派對青年引導，直搗更深處、更荒涼的沙漠地帶。他們在日暮、音樂與沙漠間搖擺，逐漸逼近那條在伊斯蘭傳說中象徵天堂與地獄之間、纖細如髮絲的 Sirāt 西拉特橋......
sirāt::2026.tmdb_overview_en: A man and his son arrive at a rave lost in the mountains of Morocco. They are looking for Marina, their daughter and sister, who disappeared months ago at another rave. Driven by fate, they decide to follow a group of ravers in search of one last party, in hopes Marina will be there.

strike 娜英::2024.tmdb_overview: 「保齡球的最大優點是，不管上次有沒有全倒，下一局又是全新的開始！」對於在海邊小村莊生活了一輩子的娜英來說，最重要的事情就是照顧家人。然而，母親正試圖賣掉充滿回憶的珍貴房子，而弟弟也執意要去首爾生活。當娜英努力接受生活突如其來的改變與迷惘，保齡球正好來到了娜英身邊。娜英開始花越來越多的時間在保齡球館。被保齡球的魅力打動，在學習保齡球的過程中逐漸打開心扉，重新對生活充滿希望。
strike 娜英::2024.tmdb_overview_en: The most important thing for Na-young, who has lived her entire life in a small seaside village, is taking care of her family and friends. However, her mother tries to sell their precious house full of memories, and her younger brother insists on moving to Seoul. While Na-young struggles to accept the changes, she comes across bowling and begins to spend more and more time at the bowling alley.

the breakfast club::.tmdb_overview: 五名成長背景與個性大相不同的男女同學，個性叛逆讓師長同痛不已，在被罰留校察看的期間，他們漸漸發現彼此並非那麼不同，在放下戒心與敵意後，變成了心意相通的好友，進而啟發了彼此的人生。
the breakfast club::.tmdb_overview_en: Five high school students from different walks of life endure a Saturday detention under a power-hungry principal. The disparate group includes rebel John, princess Claire, outcast Allison, brainy Brian and Andrew, the jock. Each has a chance to tell his or her story, making the others see them a little differently -- and when the day ends, they question whether school will ever be the same.

the day the earth blew up a looney tunes.tmdb_original_title: The Day the Earth Blew Up: A Looney Tunes Movie
the day the earth blew up a looney tunes.tmdb_overview: 相依為命的太菲鴨與豬小弟發現家裡屋頂破了一個大洞，經豬小妹介紹輾轉來到口香糖製造工廠打工賺維修費，竟無意間發現新上架的粉紅色泡泡糖，會讓吃過的人都變成殭屍！經三人調查，竟發現這都是邪惡外星人「魔人泡泡」的陰謀，這群「豬隊友」也成為拯救末日的唯一希望，史上最危險的太空救援任務即將展開！
the day the earth blew up a looney tunes.tmdb_overview_en: Porky and Daffy, the classic animated odd couple, turn into unlikely heroes when their antics at the local bubble gum factory uncover a secret alien mind control plot. Against all odds, the two are determined to save their town (and the world!)...that is if they don't drive each other crazy in the process.
the day the earth blew up a looney tunes.tmdb_title: The Day the Earth Blew Up: A Looney Tunes Movie
the day the earth blew up a looney tunes.tmdb_title_en: The Day the Earth Blew Up: A Looney Tunes Movie
the day the earth blew up a looney tunes.tmdb_title_local: 樂一通大戰外星人：粉紅末日

the drama::.tmdb_overview: 查理在咖啡廳邂逅艾瑪，一場笨拙的搭話開啟了兩年的甜蜜愛戀。正當兩人深信彼此是唯一、著手籌備婚禮時，一場好友聚會卻掀起波瀾。在「分享最糟糕往事」的遊戲中，艾瑪意外坦白一段不為人知的震撼過去。這份祕密讓全場難以置信，也讓查理開始重新審視這份關係。在步入禮堂的最後關頭，兩人的愛情正受誠信與信任的嚴峻考驗。
the drama::.tmdb_overview_en: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

the hangover::.tmdb_overview: 在結婚的前兩天，道格（賈斯丁巴森 飾）跟三位伴郎，也就是他的兩個麻吉菲爾和史都（布萊德利古柏和艾德赫姆斯 飾）及未來的小舅子（查克葛里芬納奇 飾），四人開車到拉斯維加斯，打算展開他們畢生難忘的通宵狂歡派對。結果，三位伴郎隔天起來頭痛欲裂，但卻發現記不起任何事。他們的高檔飯店套房變得淩亂不堪，而且新郎竟然不見了！他們三人毫無頭緒發生什麼事，不過所剩時間不多，他們必須設法回想前晚幹了什麼蠢事，弄懂到底犯了哪些錯，以求能及時找到道格，使他能夠趕回洛杉磯參加自己的婚禮。然而，他們發現的事情愈多，他們愈瞭解他們惹上多大的麻煩。
the hangover::.tmdb_overview_en: When three friends finally come to after a raucous night of bachelor-party revelry, they find a baby in the closet and a tiger in the bathroom. But they can't seem to locate their best friend, Doug – who's supposed to be tying the knot. Launching a frantic search for Doug, the trio perseveres through a nasty hangover to try to make it to the church on time.

the president s cake::2026.tmdb_overview: 1990年，伊拉克飽受戰爭摧殘與國際制裁，民間物質匱乏，但總統海珊仍要求舉國為其慶生。九歲的拉米雅與祖母相依為命、生活貧困，卻被抽中代表班級準備蛋糕，違者將面臨恐怖責罰。在總統生日前一天，拉米雅抱著心愛的公雞與祖母進城，本以為這趟只是為了收集製作蛋糕的原料，沒想到大人們心思各異。失散、偶遇、信任與背叛，揉合成童年最難忘的經歷。
the president s cake::2026.tmdb_overview_en: While people across 1990s Iraq struggle to survive the war and food shortages, Saddam Hussein requires each school in the country to prepare a cake to celebrate his birthday. Despite her efforts to avoid getting picked, 9-year-old Lamia is chosen among her classmates. The young girl must now use her wits and imagination to gather ingredients for the mandatory cake or face the consequences.

the super mario galaxy movie::.tmdb_overview: Having thwarted Bowser's previous plot to marry Princess Peach, Mario and Luigi now face a fresh threat in Bowser Jr., who is determined to liberate his father from captivity and restore the family legacy. Alongside companions new and old, the brothers travel across the stars to stop the young heir's crusade.
the super mario galaxy movie::.tmdb_overview_en: Having thwarted Bowser's previous plot to marry Princess Peach, Mario and Luigi now face a fresh threat in Bowser Jr., who is determined to liberate his father from captivity and restore the family legacy. Alongside companions new and old, the brothers travel across the stars to stop the young heir's crusade.
the super mario galaxy movie::.tmdb_title_local: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版

under the tuscan sun::.tmdb_overview: 戴安連恩飾演的法蘭西斯梅斯是舊金山一位出色的作家，最近因為失婚在創作上產生了瓶頸。法蘭西斯最好的朋友派蒂私自做主，幫她報名參加一趟義大利扥斯卡尼之旅，希望法蘭西斯可以徜徉在扥斯卡尼的美景當中，得到創作靈感，並且可以將離婚的創傷拋在腦後。  無意間，法蘭西斯發現扥斯卡尼郊區，一棟名為Bramasole的別墅正在出售；於是決定放手一搏，將自己的下半生的賭注全放在這棟破舊不堪的別墅上。浴火重生的法蘭西斯展開她生命新章節。對普通人來說，這是一段作夢才可能發生的經驗：拋下過去的一切，在人生地不熟的義大利鄉間買下一棟美麗的舊房子。這個家急需要好好整修一番，沒想到這棟房子需要花費的功夫遠超過法蘭西斯的想像，更別提，她可是一點經驗都沒有。  法蘭西斯每天都有不同的新鮮事等著她，閃電大作的暴風雨、稀奇古怪的異國風俗、怪怪的鄰居還有一些新交到的朋友，害她懷疑自己是否負荷的了。但是一趟浪漫的羅馬之行，讓法蘭西斯遇見了義大利帥氣的古董商人Marcello。靠著許多新朋友的鼎力相助，法蘭西斯終於尋覓生命中失落已久的成就感，她已經開始適應新生活，扥斯卡尼Style的生活。
under the tuscan sun::.tmdb_overview_en: Frances Mayes, a 35-year-old professor and writer from San Francisco, decides to take a tour of Tuscany following a difficult divorce. After impulsively buying a run-down villa in the Italian countryside, she begins to piece her life back together in unexpected ways.

when harry met sally::.tmdb_overview: 大學畢業時，哈利在旅途中偶遇了莎莉，倆人聊得並不愉快。哈利認為男女之間不可能有真正的友誼，莎莉卻不以為然，於是不歡而散。5年後，倆人又在飛機上巧遇，這時他們都有了意中人，但觀點卻沒有改變，再次不歡而散。  當倆人再相逢時，都因感情出現了危機而有了共同語言。哈利此時也有些相信男女之間可以有純潔友誼了。他們相互為對方介紹對象，沒想到找來的一男一女卻陷入了熱戀之中，令人哭笑不得。隨著對彼此理解的加深，倆人超出了友誼的界限，事後卻又有些不安和後悔。  新年之夜，哈利忽然領悟到友誼和愛情可以同時存在，於是他瘋狂地找尋莎莉....
when harry met sally::.tmdb_overview_en: Sex always gets in the way of friendships between men and women. At least, that's what Harry Burns believes. So when Harry meets Sally Albright and a deep friendship blossoms between them, Harry's determined not to let his attraction to Sally destroy it. But when a night of weakness ends in a morning of panic, can the pair avoid succumbing to Harry's fears by remaining friends and admitting they just might be the perfect match for each other?

一念菩提::.tmdb_overview: 父親剛晉升革命法庭的調查法官，家人正為此高興，街頭卻掀起頭巾革命，一場家庭風暴正悄悄醞釀。手握起訴大權的父親，在上級施壓下成為死刑判決的橡皮圖章，既因承受尋仇壓力變得疑神疑鬼，更與不滿現狀、暗中支持抗爭的女兒們裂痕加深，母親則卡在中間左右為難。當父親的佩槍不翼而飛，面對聲譽與職位不保，他竟將調查矛頭指向心愛家人。
一念菩提::.tmdb_overview_en: Investigating judge Iman grapples with paranoia amid political unrest in Tehran. When his gun vanishes, he suspects his wife and daughters, imposing draconian measures that strain family ties as societal rules crumble.
一念菩提::.tmdb_title: The Seed of the Sacred Fig
一念菩提::.tmdb_title_en: The Seed of the Sacred Fig

不代罪的羔羊::2023.tmdb_overview: 在留尼旺島上，12歲小男孩在路邊養著一頭可愛羔羊。即將到來的古爾邦節，讓他擔心羔羊會被獻祭並煮成餐桌上的菜餚，他聯手剛搬來的鄰居女孩，決心拯救最親愛的動物夥伴。本片透過青春活潑的童趣調性，展現島民獨特的風土民情，以及馬約特人、科摩羅人、穆斯林等多元族群的宗教與文化異同，展現重要且難得的人文紀錄。
不代罪的羔羊::2023.tmdb_overview_en: In a Reunion Island housing project, as the time of the sacrifice for the Aïd el-Kebir approaches, Ibrahim, 12 years old and of Comoran descent, is bullied by Evan, a neighbor of the same age, who accuses him of being an animal killer. When Ibrahim learns that a goat is about to be delivered to his building he decides to save it . . . but Evan is watching. The rescue of the goat leads to some unlikely alliances as Ibrahim attempts to succeed at the rescue against all odds.

世外::2026.tmdb_overview: 人死後，輪迴之前，亡魂會來到名為「世外」的奇異之境。靈守小鬼日復一日引領迷失的亡魂投胎，直至不願轉世的小妹出現，原本沒有悲喜的小鬼開始心神震盪。為拯救小妹，小鬼毅然決定踏上橫跨千年的淚途，展開一靈一鬼的雙向救贖。
世外::2026.tmdb_overview_en: After death, before reincarnation, the souls of the deceased transit through a fantastical realm known as, Another World. Gudo is a spirit that helps to guide these transient souls to their reincarnation. While guiding a young girl named Yuri, he learns that humans have emotions that he does not understand. Tasked by Goddess Mira to help Yuri control her rage and prevent her transformation into a monster, Gudo embarks on a perilous mission.

久別重逢::.tmdb_overview: 吃布丁、騎單車、遇知己，還記得當年一起聽的那張唱片嗎？高中盛夏，轉學來的女孩夏文萱，遇上醉心音樂的少年蘇昇華。在小天地裡隨心暢聊，在雜物間偷彈琴曲，她能看見他音符裡的季節，她是他唯一的繆思。彼時初戀萌芽，卻不知道未來有多遠。數十年後，陷入人生困頓的音樂人蘇昇華再度重逢女孩。突如其來的變故，卻讓他步上一段日本的遠行，沒想到，這是女孩為他留下的時空禮物。
久別重逢::.tmdb_overview_en: When has-been pop star So Sing Wah reluctantly agrees to join Summer, the daughter of his high school crush, Ha, on a journey to Japan to scatter Ha’s ashes, he has no idea that the trip will unravel not just distance, but time itself. In their teens, So and Ha shared music, hopes, and dreams—until a sudden departure changed everything. Now, they have a second chance.

亂::1985.tmdb_overview: 久經沙場的老將也終將卸甲歸田，一文字秀虎在七十歲這一年宣佈退位，由長子接任家督重職，卻引發三子強烈反彈，遭父親逐出家門。秀虎本以為可以就此安享天年，沒想到一件件手足相殘的事件，讓一文字家陷入殺聲震耳的連天烽火。
亂::1985.tmdb_overview_en: Shakespeare's King Lear is reimagined as a singular historical epic set in sixteenth-century Japan where an aging warlord divides his kingdom between his three sons.

二百三高地::1980.tmdb_overview: 明治37年2月起到38年7月為止，約一年半的期間，日本與蘇俄之間，為了朝鮮與滿州的支配權紛爭而引發了戰爭(日俄戰爭)。而勝敗的關鍵在於乃木大將軍所率領的第七師團於"二零三高地"攻防一役。此一肉搏之戰造成日軍方面近一萬人的死傷，巨大的人員損傷下換來了日軍的勝利。本作品描寫一群在激烈戰區"二零三高地"上進行絕望性的戰鬥中的日本軍士們之間所產生的同袍之情，同時透過與"日俄戰爭"的此一史實有所關聯的人們的生活態度去了解，一個只能生產稻米及絹布，人口總數不過四千六百萬人的弱小民族日本，為何敢挑起與大國蘇俄作戰的原因，以及戰鬥的過程。利用壯闊的場景，使其重現世人眼前。至於演員方面，由仲代達矢擔綱演出乃木大將，老牌演員丹波哲郎飾演兒玉源太郎，三船敏郎飾演明治天皇，森繁久彌飾演伊藤博文。其他還有青輝彥、夏目雅子等豪華陣容共同演出。  導演方面由受到一致好評的舛田利雄執導。劇本由名作「絕仁絕義戰鬥」系列的笠原和夫執筆。本片是一部耗時3年歲月與15億日幣鉅資投入的感人超大巨作。與由佐田雅志所演唱的主題曲一起，被稱為現代日本的根源的明治的歷史鮮活的甦醒過來。
二百三高地::1980.tmdb_overview_en: Depicts the bloody siege of the fortress of Port Arthur, one of the most strongly fortified positions in the world, during the Russo-Japanese War of (1904 - 1905). In the story dominated the character Lt Takeshi Kogyo (Teruhiko Aoi), teachers, and a reserve officer who became commander of the platoon and later company. At the same time monitors the conduct of the army commander general Nogi (Tatsuya Nakadai), which was commissioned of the emperor Matsuhito (Toshirô Mifune) to the conquest of the fort.

人生海海::.tmdb_overview: 在台灣工作的阿耀回到馬來西亞，與弟妹一起為父親舉辦喪禮，卻遇到宗教局人員突然來訪，帶走了父親的遺體。原來父親生前偷偷加入了回教，因此必須葬在回教墓園。不服氣的兄弟倆因而展開搶回遺體的旅程。過程中，阿耀回憶起小時候父親教他如何在這對華人不公平的社會狡猾求存，而妹妹水雲也發現了父親入回教的真正原因。
人生海海::.tmdb_overview_en: When Ah Yao returns to Malaysia for his father’s funeral, he expects grief, not chaos. But everything turns upside down when the religious police storm in, claiming his father—who secretly converted to Islam—must be buried in an Islamic cemetery. Refusing to let go, Ah Yao and his siblings set out on a wild, darkly comedic journey to reclaim the body, confronting cultural clashes, family secrets, and absurd obstacles along the way.

人生海海::2026.tmdb_overview: 在台灣工作的阿耀回到馬來西亞，與弟妹一起為父親舉辦喪禮，卻遇到宗教局人員突然來訪，帶走了父親的遺體。原來父親生前偷偷加入了回教，因此必須葬在回教墓園。不服氣的兄弟倆因而展開搶回遺體的旅程。過程中，阿耀回憶起小時候父親教他如何在這對華人不公平的社會狡猾求存，而妹妹水雲也發現了父親入回教的真正原因。
人生海海::2026.tmdb_overview_en: When Ah Yao returns to Malaysia for his father’s funeral, he expects grief, not chaos. But everything turns upside down when the religious police storm in, claiming his father—who secretly converted to Islam—must be buried in an Islamic cemetery. Refusing to let go, Ah Yao and his siblings set out on a wild, darkly comedic journey to reclaim the body, confronting cultural clashes, family secrets, and absurd obstacles along the way.

人間的條件 第一部 純愛篇・第二部 激怒篇::1959.tmdb_original_title: 人間の條件　第１部純愛篇／第２部激怒篇
人間的條件 第一部 純愛篇・第二部 激怒篇::1959.tmdb_overview: 1943年，懷抱人道主義理想的梶，偕同妻子美千子前往滿洲老虎嶺礦場，出任戰時勞工監工一職。他試圖在殖民體制內推行改革、改善戰俘待遇，卻屢遭官僚排擠與軍方威壓，亦無法取信於遭受虐待的中國勞工。戰爭機器不斷剝奪選擇的可能，梶的處境愈發孤立，該如何讓所有人保有生存的尊嚴？他又如何保有身而為人的良心？
人間的條件 第一部 純愛篇・第二部 激怒篇::1959.tmdb_overview_en: After handing in a report on the treatment of Chinese colonial labor, Kaji is offered the post of labour chief at a large mining operation in Manchuria, which also grants him exemption from military service. He accepts and moves with his newlywed wife Michiko, but when he tries to put his ideas of more humane treatment into practice, he finds himself at odds with scheming officials, cruel foremen, and the military police.
人間的條件 第一部 純愛篇・第二部 激怒篇::1959.tmdb_title: The Human Condition I: No Greater Love
人間的條件 第一部 純愛篇・第二部 激怒篇::1959.tmdb_title_en: The Human Condition I: No Greater Love
人間的條件 第一部 純愛篇・第二部 激怒篇::1959.tmdb_title_local: 人間的條件 第一部 純愛篇・第二部 激怒篇

仲代達矢，為演員而活::2015.tmdb_original_title: 仲代達矢　「役者」を生きる
仲代達矢，為演員而活::2015.tmdb_overview: 1975年，仲代達矢與其重要創作夥伴兼妻子宮崎恭子，共同創立演員養成所「無名塾」。仲代親自參與新人選拔和集訓，早六晚八嚴格訓練；對戲時，他收斂自身存在，惟留下角色與對手衝撞。無名塾不只指導演員，更培育能立身於世的「人」，50年來人才輩出。但褪下老師身分與角色外衣，仲代的真實面貌，一直是用毛筆謄寫台詞，並貼在寢室牆上反覆背誦的樸實演員。
仲代達矢，為演員而活::2015.tmdb_overview_en: Founded in 1975 by Nakadai Tatsuya and his late wife Miyazaki Yasuko, the actor training school Mumeijuku has shaped generations of performers. Nakadai personally leads rigorous training, instilling discipline and humanity. Filmed over a year, this documentary follows the octogenarian actor as he continues to stand on stage, living for his craft and passing his unwavering devotion to the next generation.
仲代達矢，為演員而活::2015.tmdb_title: Nakadai Tatsuya: to Live for Acting
仲代達矢，為演員而活::2015.tmdb_title_en: Nakadai Tatsuya: to Live for Acting

兔嘲男孩::.tmdb_overview: 電影描述一位十歲小男孩「喬喬」，受到二戰的德國氛圍影響，一心想效忠納粹，但他卻意外發現母親在家中暗藏一位猶太女孩，兩人從互相厭惡到解彼此的過程，軟化了喬喬的態度，而塔伊加飾演的希特勒，是喬喬的幻想朋友，當他內心在是否該對納粹忠誠搖擺不定時，希特勒就會出來攪亂他的思想。
兔嘲男孩::.tmdb_overview_en: Jojo, a lonely German boy during World War II has his world shaken when he learns that his single mother is hiding a Jewish girl in their home. Influenced by a buffoonish imaginary version of Adolf Hitler, he begins to question his beliefs and confront the conflict between propaganda and his own humanity.

全面啟動::2010.tmdb_overview: 偷技高超的神偷唐姆柯比，對客戶委託的偷竊行動無往不利，目標是趁對象進入深沉的睡眠、心智遂呈現最脆弱狀態時，入侵其潛意識，將最不可告人的機密手到擒來。天賦異稟加上高科技儀器，使柯比周旋於企業間的爾虞我詐，成為不二人想的商業間諜，相對也付出極大代價，他不但淪為國際逃犯，也失去所愛的家人。因緣際會，柯比遇到一個平反的契機，能重新找回到失去的人生。這次，除了以往的潛意識搶案，還須帶領一群專家團隊走險扭轉目標人物的思維。不是偷取構想，而是植入思想。出乎意料的是，敵方竟早已設下層層防火牆，推算出其一舉一動，柯比團隊深深陷入只許成功不許失敗的夢境攻防戰…。
全面啟動::2010.tmdb_overview_en: Cobb, a skilled thief who commits corporate espionage by infiltrating the subconscious of his targets is offered a chance to regain his old life as payment for a task considered to be impossible: "inception", the implantation of another person's idea into a target's subconscious.

分秒閉睜::.tmdb_overview: 年輕的母親法蘭琪患有罕見的時間感知障礙，她無法準確感受時間的流逝，生活因而混亂不堪，她每天依靠自製的錄音來引導自己的生活與行動，某日，一名神祕女子向她提出一份高酬但高風險的工作，為了照顧家庭維持生計，法蘭琪只能無奈接受，然而，她未曾料到，這個決定將引領她走向無法挽回的黑暗深淵。
分秒閉睜::.tmdb_overview_en: Frankie, a young mother with dyschronometria, struggles to perceive time. Using cassette tapes for guidance, she takes a risky job from a mysterious woman to support her family, unaware of the dark consequences that await.

切腹::1962.tmdb_overview: 影片根據瀧口康彥的小說《異聞浪人記》改編，圍繞展現武士道精神的終極形式——切腹展開了一個別開生面的故事。影片根據瀧口康彥的小說《異聞浪人記》改編，圍繞展現武士道精神的終極形式——切腹展開了一個別開生面的故事。導演通過這個故事，對武士道精神做了一番討論，批判了所謂武士的體面這種虛假可憎的東西，謳歌了貧困武士堅守尊嚴的精神，同時對他們的不幸生活遭遇表示出深切的同情，揭露出封建社會的黑暗和不公。這是一部構思巧妙、製作精良、發人深省的傑作。本片在戛納電影界上獲得了讚譽，在日本國內贏得了每日電影評選的最佳影片獎，出演半四郎的仲代達矢憑借此片獲得了數座最佳男主演獎獎盃。
切腹::1962.tmdb_overview_en: Down-on-his-luck veteran Tsugumo Hanshirō enters the courtyard of the prosperous House of Iyi. Unemployed, and with no family, he hopes to find a place to commit seppuku—and a worthy second to deliver the coup de grâce in his suicide ritual. The senior counselor for the Iyi clan questions the ronin’s resolve and integrity, suspecting Hanshirō of seeking charity rather than an honorable end. What follows is a pair of interlocking stories which lay bare the difference between honor and respect, and promises to examine the legendary foundations of the Samurai code.

刺蠻王::1971.tmdb_overview: Set in Sung Dynasty at a tumultuous time when China is invaded by the northern Jin Empire, the story revolves around swordsman Ge (David Tong Wai), who is wronged for murdering the son of the Prime Minister. Luckily, his superb kung fu helps him escape. But when the Sung General Chang is killed by the Jin Admiral Wanyan, and Chang's beautiful daughter Chu (Han Hsiang Chin) is seeking a patriotic hero to avenge his father's death, Ge pledges to assassinate Wanyan within ten days and marry Chu. But he has to first deal with the four kung fu masters serving under the Jin Admiral.
刺蠻王::1971.tmdb_overview_en: Set in Sung Dynasty at a tumultuous time when China is invaded by the northern Jin Empire, the story revolves around swordsman Ge (David Tong Wai), who is wronged for murdering the son of the Prime Minister. Luckily, his superb kung fu helps him escape. But when the Sung General Chang is killed by the Jin Admiral Wanyan, and Chang's beautiful daughter Chu (Han Hsiang Chin) is seeking a patriotic hero to avenge his father's death, Ge pledges to assassinate Wanyan within ten days and marry Chu. But he has to first deal with the four kung fu masters serving under the Jin Admiral.

名偵探柯南 黑鐵的魚影::2023.tmdb_original_title: 名探偵コナン 黒鉄の魚影（サブマリン）
名偵探柯南 黑鐵的魚影::2023.tmdb_overview: 柯南與少年偵探團受邀來到八丈島海域賞鯨，卻意外捲入黑暗組織的陰謀事件。柯南收到赤井秀一的消息，得知有一位歐洲刑警機構職員遭到琴酒殺害，於是決定潛入海洋設施「太平洋浮標」進行調查，然而在調查過程中，灰原哀的生命卻陷入險境。柯南能否順利救出灰原？灰原的真實身分是否會被發現？新的黑影PINGA又是誰？
名偵探柯南 黑鐵的魚影::2023.tmdb_overview_en: While visiting Hachijo-jima, Conan sneaks aboard a security boat heading to the Pacific Buoy, an off-shore facility constructed near the coasts built to connect surveillance cameras used by police forces around the world. However, an engineer gets abducted! An eerie sound of a propeller hums underwater as a dark figure begins to creep toward Ai Haibara... When the forbidden Black Box is opened, the sealed-away past will surface above the treacherous waves!
名偵探柯南 黑鐵的魚影::2023.tmdb_title_local: 名偵探柯南：黑鐵的魚影

呼吸練習::2024.tmdb_overview: 那年夏天，媽媽又住進醫院。沂凌因身世問題再加上遭受姊姊思晴突如其來的妒忌，而感到無所適從。在日復一日的生活中，她們練習用力呼吸，也練習迎接死亡到來的那一天。知名舞台劇演員鄧九雲跨刀演出，共譜深刻女性親情詩篇。
呼吸練習::2024.tmdb_overview_en: In that summer, mom is admjavascript:window.document.synopsis.submit()itted to the hospital again. Ling was at a loss at home with the reappearance of her birth mom as well as the sudden change of jealous attitude from her elder sister Ching. How should they encounter the forth coming death? It turns out that something as natural as breathing needs practice as well.

哈姆奈特::.tmdb_overview: 1580年，英國。貧困的拉丁語家教威廉莎士比亞遇見自由奔放的艾格妮絲，兩人深受對方吸引，展開一段熾熱戀情，並迅速步入婚姻，與三個孩子過著幸福的生活。但當遠在倫敦的威廉戲劇事業迅速發展之際，艾格妮絲卻必須獨自撐起他們的家庭。突如其來的悲劇，讓這對夫妻曾經堅不可摧的羈絆就此受到嚴峻考驗，而這段經歷，也造就了莎士比亞的不朽傑作────〈哈姆雷特〉。
哈姆奈特::.tmdb_overview_en: The powerful story of love and loss that inspired the creation of Shakespeare's timeless masterpiece, Hamlet.

喀布爾，信仰之間::.tmdb_overview: 祈禱聲間，步槍上肩，信仰與武裝構成日常。虔誠的阿富汗兄弟身在其間：哥哥巡邏站崗，視殉道為夢想，亦為俗務心煩；弟弟尚未成年，放牧遊玩、背誦經文，以兄長為榜樣，天真全寫在臉上。鏡頭用開放取代評斷，微觀塔利班神權統治下的男性成長。外人眼中的洗腦灌輸，在他們心中是充實救贖，使觀眾擺盪於同感與震撼之間。
喀布爾，信仰之間::.tmdb_overview_en: A devoted soldier of the Taliban's ideology that has shaped his destiny since birth, Samim (23) struggles between the alluring promises of martyrdom and the mundanity of his daily existence as a husband and farmer. Samim's younger brother, Rafi (14), idolizes his big brother as he navigates the confusion of adolescence, leaving behind playfulness to enter a world shaped by decades of military intervention and resulting radicalization.

地球迷航::2021.tmdb_overview: 「老師說我一輩子都學不會，我很痛苦、我很生氣，卻又無法出言反駁。」患有口語表達障礙的廷瑋，常有幻聽、幻覺的大學生沛軒，無法適應學校生活的惠綸，感情充沛卻不擅表達的樹緯，他們在地球上迷了航，卻在多寶藝術學堂韓淑華老師的引領下，用動人的詩句和音樂，以及多彩畫筆，突破冷漠疏離，揮灑出內心熱烈的小宇宙。
地球迷航::2021.tmdb_overview_en: In 2010, director Lin Cheng-sheng made Twinkle Twinkle Little Star, a documentary about autistic children and their teacher Han Shu-hua, who taught her young charges to express themselves through art. In this moving follow-up, Lin once again follows Han, who has since founded a shelter institute where autistic children can nurture their talents in painting and music. Because of their inability to effectively communicate their emotions and thoughts, people with autism can often be treated like outsiders. To inspire empathy for them, Lin made this moving documentary that embraces the diversity that these talented individuals and their stirring works of art bring to our lives.

墜惡真相::.tmdb_overview: 一起離奇的墜樓事件，一場人性的殘酷剖析，真相和謊言又將如何辯證？德國作家珊卓與法國籍丈夫、11歲的兒子、一隻狗，同住在阿爾卑斯山區的偏遠小鎮，過著與世隔絕的生活。某日丈夫墜樓身亡，珊卓被控涉嫌謀殺，而唯一證人竟是盲眼的兒子。隨著警方調查及法庭審訊，意外揭露這段婚姻深藏的謊言與秘密……。
墜惡真相::.tmdb_overview_en: A woman is suspected of her husband's murder, and their blind son faces a moral dilemma as the sole witness.

夜車::.tmdb_overview: A group of teenagers stop at a service station after a leaving a disco. In a fight resulting from their inability to pay, the staff on duty are killed by the group, which leads to a desperate night of cat and mouse with the police.
夜車::.tmdb_overview_en: A group of teenagers stop at a service station after a leaving a disco. In a fight resulting from their inability to pay, the staff on duty are killed by the group, which leads to a desperate night of cat and mouse with the police.

奇幻導航::2025.tmdb_overview: 莎拉和大衛是兩位素未謀面的單身男女，在一次共同朋友的婚禮上相遇，因為各種出人意料的命運轉折，他們踏上一段大膽、奇幻又美麗的旅程。這是一場充滿趣味與奇想的冒險，他們得以重返各自過去的重要時刻，重新理解自己如何走到今天的現在，甚至有機會改寫自己的未來。
奇幻導航::2025.tmdb_overview_en: Sarah and David are single strangers who meet at a mutual friend’s wedding and soon, through a surprising twist of fate, find themselves on a funny, fantastical, sweeping adventure together where they get to re-live important moments from their respective pasts, illuminating how they got to where they are in the present... and possibly getting a chance to alter their futures.

女孩不平凡::.tmdb_overview: 17歲的欣住在去哪都不超過30分鐘的澳門，她生活平凡，直到遇見學姐菲，才開始思考是否可以過更多彩的生活。22歲時，她在臺灣念新聞系，與女友晴同居，但畢業季讓她陷入困境，無法決定未來。34歲的欣在香港打拼，試圖擺脫一片導演的魔咒，但面對適婚女友貝的壓力，最終在假結婚狂想中領悟到做自己是最佳的生存之道。
女孩不平凡::.tmdb_overview_en: At 17, Xin lived a simple life in Macau. She enjoyed exploring the “world” with her DV camera, understanding the value of ordinary life. However, everything changed when she met her senior schoolmate Fei, who brought a new rhythm to Xin’s life. At 22, Xin embraced a free life in Taiwan, studying journalism and living with her girlfriend, Qing. Despite seeming ordinary, her life was also marked by graduation uncertainties. Xin wanted to stay in Taiwan but faced obstacles, and returning to Macau meant confronting her family. At 34, Xin lived a busy life shuttling between Hong Kong and Macau. Anxious to break free from the curse of being an assistant director, she felt pressured by her eligible actress girlfriend, Bei, to become independent. Facing external worries and internal conflicts, Xin finally realized that embracing her true self and being carefree might be the best way to survive.

女孩不平凡::2026.tmdb_overview: 17歲的欣住在去哪都不超過30分鐘的澳門，她生活平凡，直到遇見學姐菲，才開始思考是否可以過更多彩的生活。22歲時，她在臺灣念新聞系，與女友晴同居，但畢業季讓她陷入困境，無法決定未來。34歲的欣在香港打拼，試圖擺脫一片導演的魔咒，但面對適婚女友貝的壓力，最終在假結婚狂想中領悟到做自己是最佳的生存之道。

However, everything changed when she met her senior schoolmate Fei, who brought a new rhythm to Xin’s life. At 22, Xin embraced a free life in Taiwan, studying journalism and living with her girlfriend, Qing. Despite seeming ordinary, her life was also marked by graduation uncertainties. Xin wanted to stay in Taiwan but faced obstacles, and returning to Macau meant confronting her family. At 34, Xin lived a busy life shuttling between Hong Kong and Macau. Anxious to break free from the curse of being an assistant director, she felt pressured by her eligible actress girlfriend, Bei, to become independent. Facing external worries and internal conflicts, Xin finally realized that embracing her true self and being carefree might be the best way to survive.

她的嗜好::.tmdb_overview: 鄭仁因受到家暴而和丈夫離婚，搬回了她的家鄉，在忍受著村民們的窺探與議論時，她漸漸被新搬來鎮上的惠貞所吸引，兩人一拍即合，惠貞自由奔放且自信的性格讓鄭仁看到了擺脫悲慘生活的希望。某天，惠貞與鄭仁分享了自己的特殊「嗜好」，一場血腥殺戮隨即展開。
她的嗜好::.tmdb_overview_en: Jeong-in, who recently divorced a violent husband, moves back to her hometown. While suffering from nosy villagers, she is soon drawn to Hye-jung, a newcomer to the town. Two young women soon get closer and Hye-jung’s freewheeling and confident character inspires Jeong-in to break free of her wretched life. One day, Hye-jung suggests Jeong-in share a ‘hobby’ with her, and now their bloody hobby is about to begin.

學校的牆不見了::.tmdb_overview: 透過一年的實地拍攝，展現烏克蘭師生在戰火下堅持教育的日常。此紀錄片在無訪談、無旁白、無重演的情況下，描繪烏克蘭距離戰火邊緣的師生，他們在於實體與線上教室間生活的脆弱與堅毅。
學校的牆不見了::.tmdb_overview_en: Despite the war, school life continues in Ukraine, with pupils and teachers striving to continue learning even under constant threat. The film is a mosaic of the everyday lives of teachers and students from different corners of Ukraine.

小鬼當家2 紐約迷途記::1992.tmdb_original_title: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York
小鬼當家2 紐約迷途記::1992.tmdb_overview: 第一部的主要演員原班人馬演出，包括麥考利·克金和兩個演反派的笨賊。故事處景在紐約大都會，講述那位超乎常人的小孩，在聖誕前夕在機場與家人失散，小孩獨自上錯飛機去了紐約。在一幢吉屋用不同的家居陷阱，招待逃獄出來的兩個笨賊。
小鬼當家2 紐約迷途記::1992.tmdb_overview_en: Instead of flying to Florida with his folks, Kevin ends up alone in New York, where he gets a hotel room with his dad's credit card—despite problems from a clerk and meddling bellboy. But when Kevin runs into his old nemeses, the Wet Bandits, he's determined to foil their plans to rob a toy store on Christmas Eve.
小鬼當家2 紐約迷途記::1992.tmdb_title: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York
小鬼當家2 紐約迷途記::1992.tmdb_title_en: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York

小鬼當家::1990.tmdb_overview: 一年一度的聖誕節又到了。全家忙著外出歡度聖誕假期，不料忙中出錯，將家裡最小的成員——8歲的凱文（Macaulay Culkin 飾）留在了家裡。爸爸媽媽急壞了，可此時他們已經身在外地，一時亦無可奈何。倒是凱文樂壞了，難得一個人在家，凱文將家里布置成了“遊樂場”。  兩個剛出獄的竊賊將目光瞄向了凱文家。當他們鬼鬼祟祟的踏入凱文家時，凱文憑藉自己的醒目和家裡的“遊樂場機關”，和兩個笨賊玩起了“遊戲”，笑料百出。凱文最後能否這場“遊戲”的勝利？
小鬼當家::1990.tmdb_overview_en: Eight-year-old Kevin McCallister makes the most of the situation after his family unwittingly leaves him behind when they go on Christmas vacation. When thieves try to break into his home, he puts up a fight like no other.

山忌 黃衣小飛俠::.tmdb_overview: 嘉銘（劉以豪 飾）、玉欣（袁澧林 飾）和安偉（曹佑寧 飾）是大學登山社的好友。某次登山途中，他們意外迷失方向，儘管沿路綁上白布條作記號，卻不斷繞回原處，彷彿陷入無盡迴圈。荒亂之際，濃霧中隱約出現一個身穿黃色雨衣的身影，讓三人燃起希望。沒想到，詭異現象卻接連發生，真正的噩夢才剛剛開始……。
山忌 黃衣小飛俠::.tmdb_overview_en: Chen and his girlfriend Song encounter the legendary yellow raincoat ghost in the mountains. Song dies tragically every night, and Chen must keep reliving this miserable day over and over.

弟弟追著恐龍跑::2019.tmdb_overview: 傑克的弟弟傑歐患有唐氏症。小時候的傑克相信父母對他說的謊，覺得傑歐是個擁有超能力的孩子，就像漫畫裡一樣。然而，現在的傑克就要上高中了，他已經不再相信他的弟弟是超人，事實上，他覺得他很丟臉，尤其是在他遇到艾蓮娜之後。傑克絕不允許自己在心儀的女孩面前出糗，於是照顧弟弟這件事很快就成了他的負擔。傑克甚至假裝自己沒有弟弟，並向新同學，尤其是艾蓮娜，隱藏了這件事。但如果你無法愛一個人的全部，包含他的缺點，別人也不會愛你的全部。傑歐將用他直接的方式、獨特的觀點、簡單卻有智慧的話語，來教會哥哥傑克這個人生道理。
弟弟追著恐龍跑::2019.tmdb_overview_en: As a child, Jack believed the tender lie his parents told him, that Gio was a special being with superpowers, as in a comic book. Now that he is about to go to high school, however, Jack no longer believes that his brother is a superhero, in fact, he is almost ashamed of him, especially since he met Arianna, the first love of his life.

影武者::1980.tmdb_overview: 日本戰國烽火正熾，武田信玄憑卓越統御能力雄霸一方，卻在戰場上意外中鎗。垂危之際，他囑咐親信隱瞞死訊，以維持士氣並牽制宿敵。接掌大局的家臣迫不得已，只能勸服一名外貌極似信玄的市井罪犯出任「影武者」。面對時勢變化如風，強敵環伺如林，戰況延燒如火，影武者能否搬演信玄虎威，運籌帷幄不動如山？
影武者::1980.tmdb_overview_en: Akira Kurosawa's lauded feudal epic presents the tale of a petty thief who is recruited to impersonate Shingen, an aging warlord, in order to avoid attacks by competing clans. When Shingen dies, his generals reluctantly agree to have the impostor take over as the powerful ruler. He soon begins to appreciate life as Shingen, but his commitment to the role is tested when he must lead his troops into battle against the forces of a rival warlord.

心聆舞曲::2024.tmdb_overview: 在芬蘭熱鬧的夏季，29歲的西莉和她樂觀的父親彼得里在探戈節上展開了一場觀念對決，西莉總說「不」，而彼得里總說「是」，兩人性格南轅北轍，誤會和意外層出不窮，西莉忙碌處理老闆的婚姻危機；彼得里則掩飾內心混亂，用優雅的探戈假裝一切正常，當最後一支探戈落幕，冰冷的現實迫使他們正視彼此的謊言。
心聆舞曲::2024.tmdb_overview_en: Siiri, a hardworking millennial, wants to be successful in her job as the advisor to the Minister of Economic Affairs. She craves a promotion. Siiri’s job takes her and the hard-to-handle minister, an unpredictable eccentric boss lady, to a big tango festival in a small Finnish town. Siiri’s father Petri, a former tango artist and an overly optimistic middle-aged man, wants to make himself useful to Siiri while trying to hide the fact that he himself is homeless, bankrupt and finally at his wits end. Over the course of one summer weekend both Siiri’s and Petri’s facade comes tumbling down but the tango keeps going on in the sweet Finnish summer night.

情感的價值::.tmdb_overview: 出身電影世家的女星諾拉，在劇場界赫赫發光、稱霸一方。妹妹安涅絲則選擇家庭，和老公孩子過著平靜的生活。她們曾經盛極一時、離家多年的名導父親古斯塔夫企圖東山再起，於是向諾拉提出新片邀約。諾拉雖然婉拒，沉埋已久的傷痛卻再次被挑起。被拒絕的古斯塔夫，轉而改邀渴望成名的美國女星瑞秋擔綱演出。欣喜若狂的瑞秋一口答應，卻很快發現自己竟無意間介入了一場極度私密、充滿親情糾葛的家庭關係……。
情感的價值::.tmdb_overview_en: Sisters Nora and Agnes reunite with their estranged father, the charismatic Gustav, a once-renowned director who offers stage actress Nora a role in what he hopes will be his comeback film. When Nora turns it down, she soon discovers he has given her part to an eager young Hollywood star.

惡女花魁::2026.tmdb_overview: 清葉八歲時，就被賣到酒家學做藝妓。天生反骨好強的個性，加上領她入門的藝妓粧妃（菅野美穗 飾）技術高超，讓長大後的清葉（土屋安娜 飾）成了眾所矚目的焦點。然而她不慎迷戀恩客反遭拋棄，讓她對愛情完全失望，決心全力以赴投入工作，遂即當上首席藝妓－花魁。這時，她遇上一個肯為她付出一切的武士將軍－倉之助（椎名桔平 飾）。將軍不惜鉅資完成了清葉的心願，讓清葉十分感動並決定嫁給將軍…。
惡女花魁::2026.tmdb_overview_en: Kiyoha rises from the lowly courtesan ranks to the high class position of Oiran in the steamy red-light district of Yoshiwara. She is determined to stand on her own two feet and live life as she pleased.

愚者的身分::.tmdb_overview: 犯罪集團分子拓矢、阿護與梶谷遊走東京，誆騙孑然一身的男子出售身分。有人萬念俱灰、有人力求翻身，販賣人生成了一筆筆絕佳生意。隨著組織指派的任務越加泯滅人性，拓矢決心脫離、邁向新生活之際，卻慘遭上司背叛追緝。阿護倖免於難卻始終心繫拓矢，梶谷因任務陷入道德困局。三人亡命天涯，不堪的過往如影隨形，縱有贖罪抵抗的勇氣，重獲新生又談何容易？
愚者的身分::.tmdb_overview_en: To get by, Takuya and Mamoru pose as women in an online scheme, but when they try to leave this life, they must rely on their dangerous mentor for help.

愛在日落巴黎時::.tmdb_overview: 九年前，傑西（伊森霍克）與席琳（茱莉蝶兒）在火車上相遇，在維也納共度一晚，在日出前定下半年之約後各自離去，但是卻從此失去與對方的聯繫。九年後，傑西帶著以這段邂逅寫成的書來到巴黎，就在他開新書記者會的同時，席琳出現了。日落之後就要撘趕著搭飛機的傑西，利用留在巴黎最後的幾個小時，拉著席琳在咖啡館中、巴黎街頭與塞納河上，彷彿停不下來似的說著話，想用最短的時間知道對方這九年來的境遇。  兩人這時好比站在凌虛御空的鋼索上，似乎必須趁這個機會作出某種重大的人生決定，卻又好像只是兩個再次相逢彼此投緣的心靈舊識，永遠有聊不完的話題。日落時分即將來臨，離傑西飛機起飛的時間越來越接近了…，兩人是否會做出改變彼此今生的決定？！
愛在日落巴黎時::.tmdb_overview_en: Nine years later, Jesse travels across Europe giving readings from a book he wrote about the night he spent in Vienna with Celine. After his reading in Paris, Celine finds him, and they spend part of the day together before Jesse has to again leave for a flight. They are both in relationships now, and Jesse has a son, but as their strong feelings for each other start to return, both confess a longing for more.

愛在無聲孕育時::.tmdb_overview: 聾人女子安赫拉與聽人伴侶赫克托即將迎來他們的孩子，而新生命的到來卻也讓兩人的關係逐漸緊張，安赫拉必須獨自面對社會偏見與育兒挑戰，在充滿障礙的世界中尋找屬於自己的聲音，透過與手語社群的連結與自我重建，她努力學會以無聲卻堅定的方式去愛與守護，本片細膩描繪一位母親跨越隔閡、尋求理解的動人旅程。
愛在無聲孕育時::.tmdb_overview_en: Angela's deafness raises concerns during her pregnancy regarding connecting with her daughter. Post-delivery, partner Héctor supports her as she learns to mother in a society lacking adequate accommodations for the hearing-impaired.

我們的6e班::2021.tmdb_overview: 香港有一所另類的「國際學校」名叫勵志中學。大部分的學生以南亞裔為主，其中也包括內地新移民和成績較差的本地學生。學生操行問題、教學支援不足等惡劣條件，令學校師生間氣氛長期處在緊張狀態。為提升學生們對學校的歸屬感，Park Sir及Miss Law藉著每年一度的校際才藝大賽，希望讓6E班的同學能學會團隊合作，同時打破學生之間的種族隔閡。然而，就在練習進行得如火如荼之際，幾個學生陸續出現各種問題…
我們的6e班::2021.tmdb_overview_en: The film tells stories about four families with different races. By participating in an inter-school competition, reflecting a group of students in 6E class, from encountering different racial conflicts and issues, to putting all the differences by and work together for a common goal.

我只是個士兵::.tmdb_overview: 俄烏戰爭爆發之際，為了貼身記錄戰場，導演自願入伍拍片，但軍旅生活遠比想像難以適應。隨著戰事膠著，血腥、殘酷與孤寂逐步侵蝕他作為記錄者的感性。當死亡摧殘親人戰友，徒留仇恨蔓延，生命卑微如草芥，人性是否已太過稀薄而無處容身？一旦成為毫不猶豫開槍的機器，還能找回愛與家庭這些曾經熟悉的事物嗎？
我只是個士兵::.tmdb_overview_en: Award-winning Ukrainian filmmaker and cinematographer Artem Ryzhykov transforms into a hardened professional soldier as he navigates the confusion, chaos, heartache and reality of modern warfare.

我可能不會變瘦::2010.tmdb_overview: 卓姆是非常活潑開朗的孩子，他很誠實，只不過有點胖，他跟家人搬到瘦子鎮之後，原本快樂的生活全都走樣了，他父親在當地開了一間餐廳，但是在瘦子鎮，大家都很不愛出門，而且沒有胖子。卓姆在愛上全鎮最瘦的麗芙後，想盡辦法要討她的歡心，他要讓這裡的人看見他的內心真正的美。
我可能不會變瘦::2010.tmdb_overview_en: Fat adolescent Dik Trom enjoys growing up in a hedonistic town devoted to food and fun. When a restaurant chain offers his father the life-long-dreamed opportunity to run his own, the Trom family moves. Their new home town Dunhoven is however inhabited by health freaks who prefer only fitness to dietary sobriety.

我在荒野做了一場夢::2025.tmdb_overview: 四十五年來，徐仁修透過攝影與文字探索自然，既記錄其壯麗，亦警示其消亡。2019 年的一場手術，讓他首次感受到時間的重量。本片跟隨他踏上可能是人生最後的旅程——不僅深入荒野，更直面生死。當這位自然哲人走向終極遠征時，拍攝團隊也在過程中蛻變，開始思索生命、自然與人類共同的局限。
我在荒野做了一場夢::2025.tmdb_overview_en: For 45 years, Jen-Shiu Hsu has used photography and writing to explore the intricate universe of nature. He has tirelessly shared his discoveries with the world, exposing both its beauty and the destruction caused by human civilization. But in 2019, after undergoing surgery for the first time in his life, he became acutely aware of time. Suddenly, his lifelong rhythm of exploration faced an unavoidable limit. His final, unfinished expedition—will it be the closing chapter of his journey, or the start of something new? This documentary observes a man who has always sought the core of nature, now faced with the reality of his own mortality. As he embarks on one last great adventure, the film also captures how the filmmaking team, through their own journeys, begins to question their relationship with nature and their understanding of life itself.

我的他和他::.tmdb_overview: 娜塔莉亞發現丈夫埃內斯托有外遇，於是展開調查，不料丈夫的情人竟是21歲的年輕男子丹尼爾。丹尼爾不僅深愛著埃內斯托，還和他簽訂了戀愛契約。當埃內斯托突然中風，娜塔莉亞和丹尼爾被迫在他的康復期共同生活。這段錯綜複雜的三角關係，也逐漸走向失控的邊緣。
我的他和他::.tmdb_overview_en: A married woman discovers her husband is having an affair with a male prostitute and wants to meet the lover to get answers. However, her plans are interrupted when she gets a heart-stopping call from the hospital — her husband had a stroke and is lying unconscious. The wife and the lover — who fell in love with the husband — both rush to the hospital, and the remainder of the film highlights the dynamic of the two grappling with their situation as they both wait for the husband to recover in the ICU.

托斯卡尼艷陽下::.tmdb_overview: 戴安連恩飾演的法蘭西斯梅斯是舊金山一位出色的作家，最近因為失婚在創作上產生了瓶頸。法蘭西斯最好的朋友派蒂私自做主，幫她報名參加一趟義大利扥斯卡尼之旅，希望法蘭西斯可以徜徉在扥斯卡尼的美景當中，得到創作靈感，並且可以將離婚的創傷拋在腦後。  無意間，法蘭西斯發現扥斯卡尼郊區，一棟名為Bramasole的別墅正在出售；於是決定放手一搏，將自己的下半生的賭注全放在這棟破舊不堪的別墅上。浴火重生的法蘭西斯展開她生命新章節。對普通人來說，這是一段作夢才可能發生的經驗：拋下過去的一切，在人生地不熟的義大利鄉間買下一棟美麗的舊房子。這個家急需要好好整修一番，沒想到這棟房子需要花費的功夫遠超過法蘭西斯的想像，更別提，她可是一點經驗都沒有。  法蘭西斯每天都有不同的新鮮事等著她，閃電大作的暴風雨、稀奇古怪的異國風俗、怪怪的鄰居還有一些新交到的朋友，害她懷疑自己是否負荷的了。但是一趟浪漫的羅馬之行，讓法蘭西斯遇見了義大利帥氣的古董商人Marcello。靠著許多新朋友的鼎力相助，法蘭西斯終於尋覓生命中失落已久的成就感，她已經開始適應新生活，扥斯卡尼Style的生活。
托斯卡尼艷陽下::.tmdb_overview_en: Frances Mayes, a 35-year-old professor and writer from San Francisco, decides to take a tour of Tuscany following a difficult divorce. After impulsively buying a run-down villa in the Italian countryside, she begins to piece her life back together in unexpected ways.

抓馬戀人::.tmdb_overview: 查理在咖啡廳邂逅艾瑪，一場笨拙的搭話開啟了兩年的甜蜜愛戀。正當兩人深信彼此是唯一、著手籌備婚禮時，一場好友聚會卻掀起波瀾。在「分享最糟糕往事」的遊戲中，艾瑪意外坦白一段不為人知的震撼過去。這份祕密讓全場難以置信，也讓查理開始重新審視這份關係。在步入禮堂的最後關頭，兩人的愛情正受誠信與信任的嚴峻考驗。
抓馬戀人::.tmdb_overview_en: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

日本的悲劇::2012.tmdb_overview: 摯愛髮妻意外猝逝，頹唐獨子中年失業，重病纏身的老木匠自知時日無多，決定將房門釘死，斷絕飲食，並囑咐兒子在找到工作前不要破門，以便續領年金維持生計。曾經三代同堂、幸福美滿，如今天人永別、僅餘苦難，人生一夜失色。一門之隔的父子二人，能否尋回彼此的羈絆，重拾生之慾，走完生之路？
日本的悲劇::2012.tmdb_overview_en: In 2010, 31,560 people ended their own lives and about 20,000 people died or went missing with the earthquake. Unemployed widower Fujio Murai’s family tragedy contains instances of both; diagnosed with lung cancer, Fujio refuses surgery and returns home with his son Yoshio.

早餐俱樂部::.tmdb_overview: 五名成長背景與個性大相不同的男女同學，個性叛逆讓師長同痛不已，在被罰留校察看的期間，他們漸漸發現彼此並非那麼不同，在放下戒心與敵意後，變成了心意相通的好友，進而啟發了彼此的人生。
早餐俱樂部::.tmdb_overview_en: Five high school students from different walks of life endure a Saturday detention under a power-hungry principal. The disparate group includes rebel John, princess Claire, outcast Allison, brainy Brian and Andrew, the jock. Each has a chance to tell his or her story, making the others see them a little differently -- and when the day ends, they question whether school will ever be the same.

束草之冬::.tmdb_overview: 在南韓海邊小鎮束草，25歲的秀荷過著單調的生活，生活不外乎是探望經營魚販生意的母親、和男友俊昊的相處，直到法國男子楊科宏來到秀荷工作的民宿，她心中開始浮現對自我認同的疑問，以及對幾乎一無所知的法國父親的好奇，當冬季降臨小鎮，秀荷和楊科宏彼此觀察、試探，小心翼翼地編織起一段脆弱的連結。
束草之冬::.tmdb_overview_en: In the snowy seaside town of Sokcho, 25-year-old Soo-Ha works at a guesthouse. She drifts between her mother’s fish stall and her boyfriend until a French artist’s arrival stirs questions about her identity. As winter deepens, Soo-Ha and the artist form an unspoken connection through food and art.

東極島::.tmdb_overview: 二戰期間，中國舟山附近海域，一艘載滿英軍戰俘的日本貨輪被擊沈，上千名英軍戰俘被日軍封鎖于船艙內。絕境之時，東極島上的一群漁民毅然前來。他們憑借骨子裏的善良、野性與血性，在驚濤駭浪中，為落難的戰俘打開一條生路。
東極島::.tmdb_overview_en: Inspired by the real life rescue of over 300 British soldiers in 1942, Dongji Rescue is a rousing, action-packed story of heroism on the high seas. When the Japanese warship Lisbon Maru is torpedoed off the coast of Dongji Island, the lives of over 300 British POWs on board are at risk of being claimed by the sea. Their only hope is a small group of defiant Chinese fisherman who will do anything to rescue and protect them from their captors.

歌喉讚::.tmdb_overview: 巴頓大學新鮮人貝卡是一個寧可聽耳機音樂、也不願意聽別人講話的少女，郤意外加入學校的阿卡貝拉女子美聲合唱團，該社團集結了又乖又壞又怪的各樣女性成員，唯一共通點就是能清唱出猶如天籟的美聲。與校園格格不入的貝卡，如何以她驚人的才華改變阿卡貝拉的傳統表演方式？又如何率領這群女生與競爭激烈的全國美聲團體一較高下？共譜青春生命的繽紛音符！
歌喉讚::.tmdb_overview_en: College student Beca knows she does not want to be part of a clique, but that's exactly where she finds herself after arriving at her new school. Thrust in among mean gals, nice gals and just plain weird gals, Beca finds that the only thing they have in common is how well they sing together. She takes the women of the group out of their comfort zone of traditional arrangements and into a world of amazing harmonic combinations in a fight to the top of college music competitions.

殺戮戰場的邊緣::1986.tmdb_overview: 一九八○年代中期，有大約二十五萬高棉難民與少數越南難民為了躲避赤棉與越南占領軍翼護下的韓森政權進行的內戰，逃到了泰國與高棉邊界，被泰國政府安置在泰棉邊界的十多個難民營中。《殺戮戰場的邊緣》即試圖呈現這些居住在擁擠而物資缺乏的難民營中的生活情形、宗教與文化活動，並紀錄了飽受越南軍砲轟與地雷威脅的緊張氣氛與死傷情景。影片也採訪了當時流亡國外的前高棉國王施努雅、高棉反抗軍領袖、聯合國秘書長即來自各國的志願工作者，評估當時的局勢與難民問題。
殺戮戰場的邊緣::1986.tmdb_title: Beyond the Killing Fields: Refugees on the Thai-Cambodian Border
殺戮戰場的邊緣::1986.tmdb_title_en: Beyond the Killing Fields: Refugees on the Thai-Cambodian Border

海邊的貓咪偵探社::2022.tmdb_original_title: 海岸通りのネコミミ探偵
海邊的貓咪偵探社::2022.tmdb_overview: 猫塚因貓咪走失而到寵物偵探事務所請求協助，後因無力支付調查費，而在事務所打工償還。某日，裕太因貓咪不見而到事務所求助，他的父母正在調停離婚，同樣父母離異的猫塚能體會男孩感受，於是一起協助裕太尋找他的貓咪。
海邊的貓咪偵探社::2022.tmdb_overview_en: In the coastal region of Shonan, a young man enlists the help of a eccentric local pet detective to search for his missing pet cat. When the man is unable to pay for the detective's help, he joins the unusual agency to pay off the debt.

深度安靜::.tmdb_overview: 諭明（張孝全飾）與依庭（林依晨飾）在大學圖書館的「Deep Quiet Room」相識，兩人相愛並走入婚姻，原以為生活將平穩展開，卻在依庭懷孕後，過往的壓力與家庭陰影逐漸浮現，連帶改變了兩人的關係。
深度安靜::.tmdb_overview_en: After his pregnant wife Yi-ting unexpectedly committed suicide, Ming decides to take care of his father-in-law, only to find out the unbearable truth of Yi-ting’s family that leads to her death.

深度安靜::2026.tmdb_overview: 諭明（張孝全飾）與依庭（林依晨飾）在大學圖書館的「Deep Quiet Room」相識，兩人相愛並走入婚姻，原以為生活將平穩展開，卻在依庭懷孕後，過往的壓力與家庭陰影逐漸浮現，連帶改變了兩人的關係。
深度安靜::2026.tmdb_overview_en: After his pregnant wife Yi-ting unexpectedly committed suicide, Ming decides to take care of his father-in-law, only to find out the unbearable truth of Yi-ting’s family that leads to her death.

男兒王2::.tmdb_overview: Queens團隊面臨被淘汰的前景。一人扛起家庭負擔的啟明必須兼職房產仲介來維持。某一次行銷過程中，他被網紅設局受辱；雙方發生衝突的畫面被直播出去，導致他被驅逐出新加坡變裝界，禁止表演。當啟明得知泰國將舉辦一場隆重的變裝比賽時，便決定背水一戰來重拾昔日的榮耀。啟明同時面對內憂外患，兒子Mason居然決定輟學來加入網紅行列！啟明強烈反對，於是Mason挑戰；如果自己能重建Queens的聲譽；自己就能為所欲為。結果Mason以社交媒體運營經理的身份加入了泰國之旅。一到泰國，Queens馬上面臨水平不足以及其他成員與啟明溝通上的問題。此外，Queens成員Money的父親也從中作梗搞破壞，不讓他們參賽。Queens必須解決所有挑戰，而啟明也必須化解與Mason之間的矛盾，來挽救父子關係。
男兒王2::.tmdb_overview_en: The Queens are back! Facing the prospects of being phased out with their old gags, the team engage in sideline odd jobs to keep their livelihoods aﬂoat. Chee Beng, who is moonlighting as a property agent got into a bad altercation while being humiliated during one of his viewings. The result of this bad PR causes Chee Beng to be expelled from the drag community and barred from performing in Singapore. However, an opportunity arises, a drag competition in Thailand! Chee Beng pushes for the team to compete and regain their former glory while dealing with his rebellious teenage son, Mason.

畫外流離 革命直至勝利::2016.tmdb_original_title: خارج الإطار أو ثورة حتى النصر
畫外流離 革命直至勝利::2016.tmdb_overview: 基於對巴勒斯坦電影與歷史的陌生和好奇，一名電影系學生以1948年的「大災難」為分水嶺，用檔案影像走過巴勒斯坦人的戰役與掙扎。從高達《我們的音樂》等經典作起始，拼湊出40餘載的命運。全片由1982年以前，選映於各國影展的巴勒斯坦影像為素材，彰顯流浪影像的再利用手法與意義。
畫外流離 革命直至勝利::2016.tmdb_overview_en: A unique historical portrait of the Palestinian people's struggle to produce their own image. Using material long hidden in archives across the globe, the film reaches back through the modern history of Palestine and reverses decades of colonial dominance with a mosaic of struggle from the perspective of the colonized.
畫外流離 革命直至勝利::2016.tmdb_title: Off Frame AKA Revolution Until Victory
畫外流離 革命直至勝利::2016.tmdb_title_en: Off Frame AKA Revolution Until Victory
畫外流離 革命直至勝利::2016.tmdb_title_local: 畫外流離：革命直至勝利

當哈利遇上莎莉::.tmdb_overview: 大學畢業時，哈利在旅途中偶遇了莎莉，倆人聊得並不愉快。哈利認為男女之間不可能有真正的友誼，莎莉卻不以為然，於是不歡而散。5年後，倆人又在飛機上巧遇，這時他們都有了意中人，但觀點卻沒有改變，再次不歡而散。  當倆人再相逢時，都因感情出現了危機而有了共同語言。哈利此時也有些相信男女之間可以有純潔友誼了。他們相互為對方介紹對象，沒想到找來的一男一女卻陷入了熱戀之中，令人哭笑不得。隨著對彼此理解的加深，倆人超出了友誼的界限，事後卻又有些不安和後悔。  新年之夜，哈利忽然領悟到友誼和愛情可以同時存在，於是他瘋狂地找尋莎莉....
當哈利遇上莎莉::.tmdb_overview_en: Sex always gets in the way of friendships between men and women. At least, that's what Harry Burns believes. So when Harry meets Sally Albright and a deep friendship blossoms between them, Harry's determined not to let his attraction to Sally destroy it. But when a night of weakness ends in a morning of panic, can the pair avoid succumbing to Harry's fears by remaining friends and admitting they just might be the perfect match for each other?

盜夢偵探::.tmdb_overview: 千葉敦子是一家精神醫療中心的年輕女醫生，她一直致力於最尖端的精神醫療技術與臨床應用的研究，她和天才科學家時田浩作一起發明了一種能監測病患夢境、可以窺視人們心中與腦袋瓜裡秘密的儀器「DC MINI」，除了監控夢境，這個儀器更可以改變病患的夢境，在精神治療方面相當有效；不料，這個儀器突然被盜走，接著，這項研究的相關人員相繼在夢中遭到不測。敦子為此展開了調查，但也遭到暗算；然而，敦子可不是普通人物，她擁有另一個身分——「盜夢偵探紅辣椒」。  紅辣椒具有同步體驗他人夢境的特殊能力，曾多次成功治愈患者的心靈創傷；紅辣椒與利用「DC MINI」進行破壞的夢境恐怖分子展開了一場激烈纏鬥，犯人究竟是誰？他的目的何在？出人意料的真相在夢境與現實交錯的瞬間顯現……
盜夢偵探::.tmdb_overview_en: When a machine that allows therapists to enter their patient's dreams is stolen, all hell breaks loose. Only a young female therapist can stop it and recover it before damage is done: Paprika.

真愛每一天::.tmdb_overview: 提姆有家族遺傳的特殊能力，可以穿越時空，而他也運用這種能力追到了他喜愛的女孩。但是，提姆越來越頻繁地使用這種能力，卻不清楚其中隱藏的危險……
真愛每一天::.tmdb_overview_en: The night after another unsatisfactory New Year's party, Tim's father tells his son that the men in his family have always had the ability to travel through time. They can't change history, but they can change what happens and has happened in their own lives. Thus begins the start of a lesson in learning to appreciate life itself as it is, as it comes, and most importantly, the people living alongside us.

眾生相::.tmdb_overview: 俊美少年沉浸在交友軟體與一段段性冒險中，在每次短暫接觸中盜用對方話語、性格與職業背景，並在下一場約會重塑自己的身分。眾生相浮華流轉，唯有內心的渴望猶存。
眾生相::.tmdb_overview_en: A gay man impersonates men he has had sex with and brings this new persona with him to his next hook-up. Only by pretending to be someone else can he be truly himself.

禮物::.tmdb_overview: A married man on a business trip checks into a hotel. The hotel manager’s daughter falls for him at first sight. Rejected by the man, she embarks on a journey of revenge...

秘密關係 secret lover last promise::.tmdb_original_title: 秘密關係 Secret Lover 最後の約束
秘密關係 secret lover last promise::.tmdb_overview: 俊晞與拓從小就是形影不離的好朋友。然而，在大學的一場戲劇公演之後，拓向俊晞告白，兩人從此成為戀人。事實上，拓早已將對俊晞的情感深藏心中許久。他們開始了一段秘密交往，但面對各種現實的考驗與阻礙，兩人的關係也迎來巨大的試煉。這是一部凝聚青春光輝與淡淡憂傷的、酸甜動人的初戀愛情故事。
秘密關係 secret lover last promise::.tmdb_overview_en: Childhood friends Junxi and Han Tuo have grown up side by side, sharing dreams, secrets, and an unspoken bond that deepens as they enter adulthood. When Han Tuo finally confesses his long-hidden love, their friendship shifts into a fragile romance tested by family pressure, career expectations, and the fear of losing each other. As Junxi struggles with harassment at work and Han Tuo faces demands to abandon his architectural dreams, the two must confront what they truly want. The Last Promise weaves their journey into a more emotional, cinematic arc, blending new scenes with their story of first love, courage, and the vow that could either bind them together or become their final goodbye.
秘密關係 secret lover last promise::.tmdb_title_local: 秘密關係 Secret Lover: Last Promise

穿越地獄之門::.tmdb_overview: 一對父子來到摩洛哥的沙漠邊緣，尋找失蹤已久的親人。他們先在一場午夜銳舞派對中發送協尋傳單，接著經由一群派對青年引導，直搗更深處、更荒涼的沙漠地帶。他們在日暮、音樂與沙漠間搖擺，逐漸逼近那條在伊斯蘭傳說中象徵天堂與地獄之間、纖細如髮絲的 Sirāt 西拉特橋......
穿越地獄之門::.tmdb_overview_en: A man and his son arrive at a rave lost in the mountains of Morocco. They are looking for Marina, their daughter and sister, who disappeared months ago at another rave. Driven by fate, they decide to follow a group of ravers in search of one last party, in hopes Marina will be there.

穿越地獄之門::2026.tmdb_overview: 一對父子來到摩洛哥的沙漠邊緣，尋找失蹤已久的親人。他們先在一場午夜銳舞派對中發送協尋傳單，接著經由一群派對青年引導，直搗更深處、更荒涼的沙漠地帶。他們在日暮、音樂與沙漠間搖擺，逐漸逼近那條在伊斯蘭傳說中象徵天堂與地獄之間、纖細如髮絲的 Sirāt 西拉特橋......

第凡內早餐::.tmdb_overview: 本片是根據楚門凱波特（Truman Capote）的小說改編的名片，由永遠的玉女明星奧黛麗赫本領銜主演。 出身鄉下的年輕姑娘荷莉（奧黛麗赫本）在紐約曼哈頓當高級交際花，她一心盼望能嫁個年長的金龜婿；荷莉的新鄰居（喬治比柏）是個被有錢女人包養的小白臉，但他卻一直夢想將來能成為作家。 這齣經典文藝片贏得1960年的奧斯卡最佳原著音樂及最佳主題曲（"Moon River"），導演布萊克愛德華也以本片奪得最佳導演。
第凡內早餐::.tmdb_overview_en: Holly Golightly is an eccentric New York City playgirl determined to marry a Brazilian millionaire. But when young writer Paul Varjak moves into her apartment building, her past threatens to get in their way.

總統的蛋糕::2026.tmdb_overview: 1990年，伊拉克飽受戰爭摧殘與國際制裁，民間物質匱乏，但總統海珊仍要求舉國為其慶生。九歲的拉米雅與祖母相依為命、生活貧困，卻被抽中代表班級準備蛋糕，違者將面臨恐怖責罰。在總統生日前一天，拉米雅抱著心愛的公雞與祖母進城，本以為這趟只是為了收集製作蛋糕的原料，沒想到大人們心思各異。失散、偶遇、信任與背叛，揉合成童年最難忘的經歷。
總統的蛋糕::2026.tmdb_overview_en: While people across 1990s Iraq struggle to survive the war and food shortages, Saddam Hussein requires each school in the country to prepare a cake to celebrate his birthday. Despite her efforts to avoid getting picked, 9-year-old Lamia is chosen among her classmates. The young girl must now use her wits and imagination to gather ingredients for the mandatory cake or face the consequences.

肉蛾天::.tmdb_overview: In a chaotic time of men eating men, A-e gets some human meat by selling her body…
肉蛾天::.tmdb_overview_en: In a chaotic time of men eating men, A-e gets some human meat by selling her body…

臭鼬小姐::2024.tmdb_overview: 11歲的孤兒少女西蒙妮，在祖母死後，必須離開農場的家，而菲利普，一位曾創作出傑作但靈感枯竭很久的歌劇作曲家，則被迫收留他那叛逆又古怪的姪女西蒙妮，跟著她一起入住的死黨，竟然是一隻臭鼬！儘管兩人的個性南轅北轍，菲利普和西蒙妮很快發現，他們可能比自己想像的還需要彼此。
臭鼬小姐::2024.tmdb_overview_en: Philippe, an opera composer in search of inspiration, is forced to take in Simone, his rebellious, eccentric niece whose best friend is a skunk. Despite their diametrically opposed personalities, Philippe and Simone quickly discover that they may need each other more than they first thought.

舞林殺手::2026.tmdb_overview: 一群年齡、性格迥異的職業殺手，接下一單高額賞金的任務，目標是幹掉黑道老大本條平藏，而唯一能接觸他的方式，竟然是贏得舞蹈比賽！沒有經驗、沒有默契、也沒有幹勁，一支臨時拼湊的隊伍，竟要挑戰認真的舞蹈比賽？
舞林殺手::2026.tmdb_overview_en: Former assassin Daiya has long left the criminal world, but he decides to take up a mission to kill a rival gang boss for a huge payday. The catch: To kill his target at a talent show, he must go undercover and perform in a pop dance group.

艾蜜莉的異想世界::.tmdb_overview: 古靈精怪的艾蜜莉喜歡發掘生活中的小細節，也喜歡幫助周遭的人們解決生活中的小缺憾，從走不出喪妻陰霾的爸爸到離群索居的老畫家，每個人的命運都因她而產生奇妙的轉變，而屬於艾蜜莉的幸福也正悄悄地走進她的生命裡…
艾蜜莉的異想世界::.tmdb_overview_en: At a tiny Parisian café, the adorable yet painfully shy Amélie accidentally discovers a gift for helping others. Soon Amelie is spending her days as a matchmaker, guardian angel, and all-around do-gooder. But when she bumps into a handsome stranger, will she find the courage to become the star of her very own love story?

菲利斯之永夜島歷險記::2021.tmdb_original_title: Félix et le trésor de Morgäa
菲利斯之永夜島歷險記::2021.tmdb_overview: 12歲的菲利斯相信兩年前在海上失蹤的父親仍然活著，於是他決定出發尋找父親的下落。陪他一起出海的夥伴有退休的漁夫老湯姆、愛偷東西的獨腳鸚鵡阿嘎，以及生性像狗的貓咪來福。他們一路漂流到永夜島，那裡有一座地下城，住著一個秘密社群，由狂妄自大的莫嘉所統治，那裏擁有令人難以置信的寶藏。
菲利斯之永夜島歷險記::2021.tmdb_overview_en: Taking advantage of his mother's absence as she departs on a cruise ship for some rest and relaxation, 12-year-old Félix sets out to find his father, a fisherman who disappeared at sea two years earlier.
菲利斯之永夜島歷險記::2021.tmdb_title: Felix and the Treasure of Morgäa
菲利斯之永夜島歷險記::2021.tmdb_title_en: Felix and the Treasure of Morgäa
菲利斯之永夜島歷險記::2021.tmdb_title_local: 菲利斯之永夜島歷險記

萬花嬉春::.tmdb_overview: 在無聲電影時代，演員表演的身體動作遠比聲音重要，麗娜和唐正是憑著姣好外型而大受歡迎的明星搭檔。然而，有聲電影的出現，讓聲音難聽的麗娜受到極大的考驗。唐請來聲音甜美的凱西為麗娜配音，這樣的合作讓麗娜聲名大噪，但走紅的麗娜卻越來越高傲。另一方面，愛上凱西的唐正思考著，要如何讓才藝俱佳的凱西獲得該有的名譽……
萬花嬉春::.tmdb_overview_en: In 1927 Hollywood, a silent film star falls for a chorus girl just as he and his paranoid screen partner struggle to make the difficult transition to talking pictures.

虎媽伴學方程式::2015.tmdb_overview: 單親媽媽晨妲自從丈夫過世之後，一肩扛起撫養女兒阿佩莎的責任，為了讓女兒獲得最好的資源，晨妲四處奔波不遺餘力！但是，看著女兒在學校交到壞朋友，心中總是煩惱女兒不小心誤入歧途。這天，班上來了一位新同學，她叫晨妲，她要和大家交朋友，一起上課學習！
虎媽伴學方程式::2015.tmdb_overview_en: Behind the magnificent Taj Mahal lies a cluster of dingy homes where Chanda (35), a domestic help, lives with her 14-year-old daughter Appu. Chanda aspires and dreams that her daughter will study and embrace a better fate. When Appu tells her she wants to quit school and become a maid like her, Chanda takes a strong decision: she will herself go back to school, and even join the class of her daughter.

蝴蝶夢::.tmdb_overview: 年輕女子（Joan Fontaine 飾）初遇曼德利主人德文特（Laurence Olivier 飾）是在海邊的懸崖邊上。她以為德文特要跳海自盡，大叫一聲，讓德文特生氣不已。然而，接下來的二人相識繼而相知的經歷讓他們墮入愛河，結為伉儷，女子成為了曼德利莊園的女主人。幸福的生活眼看就要鋪開，這個新婚妻子卻遭遇到了陰森的「寒流」。她發現這個莊園到處可見德文特前妻麗貝卡的影子，她的名字，在傢俱留下痕跡，更令新婚妻子不安的是，管家丹佛斯太太，更是念念不忘麗貝卡，對這個新來的主人充滿仇恨。就連丈夫德文特，也不願意解釋這一切，彷彿他的內心還有舊情。麗貝卡猶如夢魘般瀰漫在曼德利莊園，事情開始變得越來越複雜。
蝴蝶夢::.tmdb_overview_en: Story of a young woman who marries a fascinating widower only to find out that she must live in the shadow of his former wife, Rebecca, who died mysteriously several years earlier. The young wife must come to grips with the terrible secret of her handsome, cold husband, Max De Winter. She must also deal with the jealous, obsessed Mrs. Danvers, the housekeeper, who will not accept her as the mistress of the house.

螳螂::.tmdb_overview: When scholar Wei Fung is forcibly hired by the Manchu Emperor to infiltrate a clan of rebellious Ming Loyalists, his mission goes adrift when he falls in love with the clan's leader's granddaughter. Wei Fung must choose between his new love and his family, who will be put to death if he doesn't return to the palace successfully.

讓建築歌唱～徐亞英的交響人生::2026.tmdb_original_title: 讓建築歌唱～徐亞英的交響人生
讓建築歌唱～徐亞英的交響人生::2026.tmdb_overview: 華裔建築聲學大師徐亞英長年與貝聿銘、法蘭克蓋瑞等多位普立茲克獎得主的建築大師合作，以隱形的聲學設計著稱，在世界各地設計和建造了近百座文化演出和藝術展覽性建築，而他晚年的集大成之作就在台灣的衛武營國家藝術文化中心，更是他最滿意之作。建築聲學是物理、音樂、建築及科學的總合，聲學家賦予音樂穿梭於經過設計的空間，讓美好的樂音能感動人心。我們跟隨著徐老師清瘦而穩健的步伐，重回他最具代表性的作品，如羅浮宮金字塔、盧森堡愛樂音樂廳等，娓娓道來他如何為建築師解決問題，成爲波宗巴克口中的『Why not』先生。他對聲學的熱情也驅使他不辭勞苦地奔波於每個設計案工地，投入一甲子的光陰追求聲音美學與空間和諧。
讓建築歌唱～徐亞英的交響人生::2026.tmdb_title: Tuning Architecture: The Life of Albert Xu in Sound
讓建築歌唱～徐亞英的交響人生::2026.tmdb_title_en: Tuning Architecture: The Life of Albert Xu in Sound
讓建築歌唱～徐亞英的交響人生::2026.tmdb_title_local: 讓建築歌唱～徐亞英的交響人生

谷的故事集::.tmdb_overview: 巴爾博納位在巴塞隆納郊區，因公路、鐵道與貝索斯河而隔絕於世。戰後煤工在此扎根，隨著各地移民湧入，儼然已成另類地球村。以黑白影像記錄流光歲月，以平實鏡頭錄下居民雜談，耆老追憶亡妻，移民述起俄烏戰爭餘波。在栽種中窺探植物細語，亦不忘吟唱生活。鐵路拆遷懸而未決，河畔狂歡後，小城何去何從。
谷的故事集::.tmdb_overview_en: In a peripheral neighbourhood, where the rural and urban worlds meet, the houses of the first migrants who arrived after the post-war period coexist with the new blocks of the dormitory city, where the latest wave of migration is concentrated. This humble corner is now an authentic global village. Good Valley Stories is a sum of constructs, of social, generational and identity, urban and ecological conflicts, but it is also a calm and humanistic look at today’s world.

贖夢::.tmdb_overview: 精神科醫生文醫生擅長挖掘病患最深層的祕密，不惜違規介入患者生活試圖導正，他偶然搭上夜班計程車司機蔡辛強的車，發現蔡辛強的舉止不尋常，原來蔡辛強飽受惡夢所苦不敢入睡，他的妻子堅信他們被鬼纏身，文醫生察覺蔡辛強無法分辦夢境與現實，決心找出問題根源，但追查病因過程中怪事不斷，駭人真相即將揭開……
贖夢::.tmdb_overview_en: A psychiatrist attempts to help an insomniac cabbie suffering from horrific and violent recurring nightmares which are spilling over and infecting their waking hours.

路有多長::2009.tmdb_overview: 《路有多長》是導演湯湘竹回家三部曲的最後一部，延續回家的主旨，這一次導演將鏡頭對準了一群在國民黨接收台灣之後，被帶往中國參加國共內戰的阿美族台籍兵。1949年，台籍兵不是戰死就是被迫滯留在中國回不了家，這種政治上的強迫分離，不只發生在台籍兵，也發生在中國。湯導演的第二部曲《山有多高》即拍攝自己的父親，一個跟隨國民黨來台，被迫滯留台灣，回不了湖南家鄉的老兵。戰爭的荒繆讓ㄧ群無辜的人民投入戰場，遠離家鄉。在山海交界的台東都蘭部落，導演湯湘竹認識了阿美族木雕藝術家希巨‧蘇飛，得知在都蘭部落有ㄧ群被帶往中國，永遠消失的少年階級，延續導演對於回家三部曲的一貫主題，及身為外省第二代，瞭解父執輩那一代對於家鄉的感念， 兩人遂以台東部落為起點，展開尋訪阿美族部落裡的台籍老兵，用影像紀錄這些被戰爭捲入的無奈人生。
路有多長::2009.tmdb_overview_en: Director Tang Shiang-chu first read about the Taiwanese veterans twenty years ago in the Ren-Jian Magazine, realizing that there were other people suffering the same fate as his father which a war took them away from their homes; and it wasn't after the cross-strait opened up forty years later that the remaining soldier were giving a chance to return home.

醉後大丈夫::.tmdb_overview: 在結婚的前兩天，道格（賈斯丁巴森 飾）跟三位伴郎，也就是他的兩個麻吉菲爾和史都（布萊德利古柏和艾德赫姆斯 飾）及未來的小舅子（查克葛里芬納奇 飾），四人開車到拉斯維加斯，打算展開他們畢生難忘的通宵狂歡派對。結果，三位伴郎隔天起來頭痛欲裂，但卻發現記不起任何事。他們的高檔飯店套房變得淩亂不堪，而且新郎竟然不見了！他們三人毫無頭緒發生什麼事，不過所剩時間不多，他們必須設法回想前晚幹了什麼蠢事，弄懂到底犯了哪些錯，以求能及時找到道格，使他能夠趕回洛杉磯參加自己的婚禮。然而，他們發現的事情愈多，他們愈瞭解他們惹上多大的麻煩。
醉後大丈夫::.tmdb_overview_en: When three friends finally come to after a raucous night of bachelor-party revelry, they find a baby in the closet and a tiger in the bathroom. But they can't seem to locate their best friend, Doug – who's supposed to be tying the knot. Launching a frantic search for Doug, the trio perseveres through a nasty hangover to try to make it to the church on time.

銀河補習班::2019.tmdb_overview: 工程設計師馬皓文因一次橋樑倒塌事故而入獄，讓他遺憾地錯過了兒子七年的成長時光。用自己獨特的教育方法和滿滿的愛給予兒子馬飛自由成長的空間，教會兒子獨立思考的能力和面對困難的勇氣。馬飛面臨學業問題，儘管在學校看來兒子沒有可塑之處，但馬皓文從未放棄，鼓勵孩子找到心中的夢想並為之努力。閻主任和馬皓文立下賭約，打算用一個月時間將馬飛的學業提高，證明他不是不可救藥的學生，「學渣」也是可造之材。
銀河補習班::2019.tmdb_overview_en: In the vast space, the astronauts lost connection with the ground. He recalled his greatest father in the most desperate situation. Father and son run across time, guarding love and family. The story is full of joy, warmth, tears and wonders.

鍵::1959.tmdb_overview: 古董鑑定師劍持為對抗衰老，異想天開地設計一場危險佈局：引導女兒的醫師未婚夫木村介入自己與妻子郁子之間，企圖利用「嫉妒」來重振自身雄風。隨著窺伺視角頻頻切換，端莊妻子的慾望覺醒、準女婿的躁動野心與女兒的冷眼旁觀逐一浮現——為了慾望機關算盡，幾人最終將迎來如何的結局？
鍵::1959.tmdb_overview_en: A middle-aged husband of a younger woman finds her youth intimidating to the point that he cannot become aroused. His solution involves the introduction of his daughter's lover to his wife.

鏡之第三樂章::.tmdb_overview: 鋼琴系學生蘿拉（寶拉貝爾 飾）在一次週末出遊途中，她意外捲入車禍，雖然毫髮無傷但男友卻重傷過世，內心則被巨大的驚嚇與空虛籠罩。在德國鄉間遇見一名目睹事故的婦人，對方因蘿拉神似早逝的女兒，而溫柔地收留她進入宛如世外桃源的家庭。這個看似溫暖的避風港，實則充滿難以言明的替代與投射，婦人試圖將失去女兒的空缺，填補在蘿拉身上，而蘿拉也在被關懷與被期待之間，逐漸感到窒息。
鏡之第三樂章::.tmdb_overview_en: On a weekend trip to the countryside, Laura miraculously survives a car crash. Physically unhurt but deeply shaken, she is taken in by a local woman who witnessed the accident and now cares for Laura with motherly devotion. When her husband and adult son also give up their initial resistance to Laura's presence, the four of them slowly build up some family-like routine. But soon they can no longer ignore their past...

門對門移動書店::.tmdb_overview: 每天，卡爾都細心地將書籍包裝好，親自送到鎮上熟客手中。他了解每個顧客的喜好，並以能為他們挑選到最合適的書而感到自豪。有天，卡爾井然有序的生活突然遭人闖入。九歲的莎莎剛從失去母親的悲傷走出來，決定加入卡爾的送書隊伍。她不僅從送書和閱讀中找到了慰藉，莎莎獨特的人生觀也幫卡爾敞開了心扉，一段意想不到的友誼就此展開。
門對門移動書店::.tmdb_overview_en: Carl’s life runs like clockwork: every day, he goes door-to-door delivering books to a handful of loyal customers. He knows their preferences and takes pride in selecting the perfect story for each of them. But his well-ordered life is turned upside down by a cheerful nine-year-old girl, Schascha, who decides to join him on his daily book round. Schascha’s unique outlook on life helps Carl to come out of his shell and realise that his customers are so much more than just that to him. But when Carl unexpectedly loses his job, this vibrant community starts to fall apart - and it will take the power of books and all Schascha’s determination to bring them back together again.

阿蒙怎麼了？::.tmdb_overview: 暑假將至，男孩的星媽被請到空蕩的教室，直到一對舊識父母入席，教師才支吾地揭露有關她兒子的驚人指控。校方試圖將大事化小，誰知真相未見釐清，情勢反而愈加膠著，看似發生在男孩間的衝突，竟逐漸牽扯進大人世界的複雜過往。校園內故障火警響個不停，怨恨與傳言猶如燎原難遏，兩個家庭的祕密燒得赤裸，誰又能全身而退。
阿蒙怎麼了？::.tmdb_overview_en: Armand, a 6-year-old boy, is accused of crossing boundaries against his best friend at elementary school. While no one knows what actually happened between the two boys, the incident triggers a series of events, forcing parents and school staff into a captivating battle of redemption where madness, desire and obsession arise.

隱蹟之書 重寫自我::2025.tmdb_overview: 資深剪輯師雪美蓮，總納悶自己到底姓史蒂芬，還是姓雪、姓陳？明明亞洲臉，又非混血，怎取洋人姓？一查不得了，父親竟來自澳洲！母親曾有文學夢，似還牽涉吳爾芙姪子的中國戀情？她化身偵探親自執導，翻找父親傳記、家庭電影、老照片，以「史蒂芬」為圓心，拼出一幅與世紀風雲、名人交織的私密家族史，追問殖民與身分認同。血緣纏如網，個體仍能重寫自我，乘故事翱翔。
隱蹟之書 重寫自我::2025.tmdb_overview_en: Veteran filmmaker Mary Stephen digs into her own family past to uncover the long-hidden origins of her Western surname, revealing a story of culture shock, colonialism, and contested remembrance.
隱蹟之書 重寫自我::2025.tmdb_title: Palimpsest: the Story of a Name
隱蹟之書 重寫自我::2025.tmdb_title_en: Palimpsest: the Story of a Name

需雲雜方::.tmdb_overview: 韓國男團ASTRO尹產賀首次挑戰大銀幕，攜手金江珉、白成鉉在朝鮮時期勇敢追逐廚師夢！出身貴族的金綏在家裡的期望之下，一直試圖考取功名，卻屢戰屢敗、仕途不順。決心備考的金綏來到一間寺廟閉關自修，卻在那裡遇見了廚師溪岩。溪岩做的美味菜餚與對料理的態度，喚醒了金綏的味蕾，也打動了他的心。金綏決定向溪岩學習廚藝，並向父親與社會證明他對料理的決心。互相學習、互相理解的兩人，甚至發展出清新甜蜜的超友誼關係...
需雲雜方::.tmdb_overview_en: Aimless after failing in several public tenders, a young man ends up meeting the best chef in the region and falls in love with the world of cuisine that he shows him.
